programme.title: Australia's Wild Places: The Red Desert
programme.desc: In this episode of Wild Places, we join botanist Peter Latz, who believes the biggest influence on the Australian arid landscape has been fire. Years ago, Peter wondered how different this country would have looked like without the influence of it.

programme.title: Australia's Wild Places: The Coast of the Whalesharks
programme.desc: On the remote coastline of Australia’s northwest, there are great natural wonders to be found. Above the sea on this sunbaked coast, there is very little; only a sparse landscape shaped by the arid conditions. But here, the miracle reveals itself…

programme.title: Australia's Wild Places: The Rainforest
programme.desc: Daintree National Park is a magical meeting of rainforest and reef, lying at the heart of the world heritage listed wet tropics of Queensland.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Okavango: Water in the Desert
programme.desc: The Okavango Delta, a huge emerald oasis in the burning heart of the Kalahari desert, is fed by the Okavango River and this perpetual cycle of wet and dry is the lifeblood of this extraordinary natural Eden.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Namibia: Sands of Time
programme.desc: Namibia is an arid, rough land. However, it has been inhabited for thousands of years, by people as well as animals, and shows no sign of losing popularity with either.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Ngorongoro: Born of Fire
programme.desc: Ngorongoro is thought to have formed about 2.5 million years ago from a large volcano, whose cone collapsed inward after a major eruption. This fertile land is full of wildlife, from cunning hyena and proud lions to vast herds of wildebeest and elephants.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Zambezi: Wild Water
programme.desc: The Zambezi is one of Africa's most influential rivers. It supports some of the continent's most spectacular wildlife. However, the Zambezi's long and winding journey destroys, as well as creates.

programme.title: The Romantics
programme.desc: Oscar winner Anna Paquin and Katie Holmes prove nothing complicates love like friendship in this zeitgeist love story.

programme.title: Elvis the Early Years: Part 1
programme.desc: The KING OF ROCK N’ ROLL, from his working class life in Memphis, Tennessee to worldwide super-stardom. Sit at the edge of your seat when Elvis struggles to make his great come-back and enjoy all the unforgettable hits.

programme.title: Elvis the Early Years: Part 2
programme.desc: The KING OF ROCK N’ ROLL, from his working class life in Memphis, Tennessee to worldwide super-stardom. Sit at the edge of your seat when Elvis struggles to make his great come-back and enjoy all the unforgettable hits.

programme.title: All Roads Lead To Rome
programme.desc: A timeless and moving romantic comedy. Uptight mother Maggie and her former Italian lover, Luca, go on a road trip across scenic Italy pursuing Maggie's rebellious teenage daughter who tries desperately to return to New York.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: A raven-haired enchantress, Cassie Nightingale, mysteriously moves into the local haunted mansion, 'Grey House', and seems to change her neighbors lives using a hint of magic causing many to think she’s a witch.

programme.title: Overdrawn At The Memory Bank
programme.desc: A weather tech's mind gets trapped in a computer and Pearl establishes her own public television pledge program.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Violent Years
programme.desc: Jam Handy shows the world the glory of sexism with electric kitchen appliances and Ed Wood analyzes the world of criminals spoiled by their parents.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Crawling Eye
programme.desc: Things start to look eerily familiar to scientists Crevett and Brooks when mountain climbers begin losing their heads in the Trollenberg Mountains.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Black Scorpion
programme.desc: Giant scorpions rise out of a volcano and attack Mexico in The Black Scorpion.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Corpse Vanishes
programme.desc: In the theater, Joel and the Bots get the third installment of "Radar Men from the Moon" before the Bela Lugosi film "The Corpse Vanishes".

programme.title: Live: Carnival of Souls
programme.desc: From the stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 comes RiffTrax, hilarious audio commentaries for your favorite - and not-so-favorite - movies!

programme.title: Rollergator
programme.desc: Shot on video without any fancy pants microphones or lights or permits to record here, Rollergator is truly something to behold. We're not saying this is the worst movie we've ever done here at RiffTrax, but that's only because nobody asked.

programme.title: Fan Favourite Marathon!
programme.desc: Fan Favorite Marathon! Setting Up A Room, Courtesy Counts A Lot, Drugs Are Like That, Paper And I, Beginning Responsibility: Taking Care of Your Own Things.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Little Shop of Horrors: Three Riffer Edition
programme.desc: Fans of shops of horrors will love this nostalgic look back, before the days of the massive chain stores and big box horror shops.
programme.sub-title: Little Shop of Horrors: Three Riffer Edition

programme.title: RiffTrax: House on Haunted Hill: Three Riffer Edition
programme.desc: Long before lunatic millionaires Michael Jackson or Rick Rockwell, there was Vincent Price's Frederic Loren, an eccentric, unhappily married fop who offers a huge cash prize to anyone who can stay overnight in the house on Haunted Hill.
programme.sub-title: House on Haunted Hill: Three Riffer Edition

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Sea's Up
programme.desc: The lagoon's waters suddenly rise and almost entirely engulf the island. Sharko and Marina take advantage of this to visit the island but Marina gets lost. She leaves a trail of coconuts behind so Sharko can find her, but Bernie outwits her…

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Hair Story
programme.desc: Marina's getting dolled up for a visit to the opera. Alas, her Octopus-Hairdresser cuts half her hair off by mistake! She has to find a wig, fast! Sharko whizzes to the island and shaves every creature he meets. But the only fur she fancies is Zig's!

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Toys Attack!
programme.desc: A cargo ship runs aground on the beach, its hold loaded with toys. Zig will turn them into inventions so he can get his mermaid: a spinning top becomes a propelling device, a croquet set, used as weapons, soap bubbles and even a giant robot!

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Sharko and His Folks
programme.desc: Sharko finally decides to declare his love to Marina. But when he pulls out the engagement ring he plans to give her, his parents show up for a surprise visit! Not easy for Sharko to present his adored Mermaid to these two.

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: The Tiny Tyrant
programme.desc: Bernie concocts a magic potion to make you incredibly strong... but keeps it for himself. He wields his new power over Zig, over Sharko, even over Neptune. In short: he's the STRONGEST of them all! Is there any way to get him step off the throne?

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: The Ghastly Ghost
programme.desc: Marina wakes a pirate's ghost - who promptly moves in with her. She thinks he's funny at first, but the pirate soon wears out his welcome. How can you lay hands on a ghost and get rid of him? Fortunately, the pirate has a hermit-crab phobia.

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Hundreds of Kids and Counting
programme.desc: Bernie adopts hundreds of cute little abandoned baby hermit-crabs. He builds them a little playground where they can hang out and play. But when Zig shows up to nab a few little toddlers for dinner, they don't turn out to be quite that cute.

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Santa Zig
programme.desc: It's Christmas! Zig decides to dress up as Santa Claus and deliver a present to Marina (and grab her at the same time). But with his coconut palm sleigh and seals instead of reindeer, discretion is not the first word that comes to mind.

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Goin' Home
programme.desc: Zig finds a book about African wildlife and realises that's where he actually comes from. He decides to go there and meet his compatriots. But hyenas are not very popular and no one is nice to him. Sharko and Marina miss him, and get depressed.

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: The Return of the Crazy Dolphin
programme.desc: After a new series of unsuccessful attempts to make off with the mermaid, Zig decides to drop the whole thing and become a vegetarian. Even the wildest, most far-out inventions of Bernie aren't enough to prod him back into action.
programme.sub-title: The Return of the Crazy Dolphin

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Loony Cruise
programme.desc: Marina and Sharko board a luxury liner for a cruise disguised as humans... Zig and Bernie join as stowaways. When Sharko's identity is discovered, all humans leave ship. Bernie is assigned to the helm, while the usual chase takes place on board.

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Bernie Moves House
programme.desc: An underwater volcanic eruption gives birth to a second island. Bernie, who has had an argument with Zig, decides to move there. While Zig has to fend for himself, Bernie builds a dream house, and parties it up with Sharko and Marina.

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Bottom's Bottom
programme.desc: Zig and Sharko sink into a crevice and land in an extraordinary world: the Abyss! They soon find themselves in a little village which they explore, avid with curiosity. A Police-fish arrests them for vagrancy, and they're locked up!

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Fisherman's Catch
programme.desc: A trawler replete with its fisherman arrives in the lagoon and starts raking the seabed to get some scallops. Sharko tells the intruder to take a powder. But the said intruder chases off the shark by playing his Breton bagpipes.

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Moby Zig
programme.desc: The lagoon is invaded by whales. Sharko tries to get rid of them. Marina wants to protect them. And Zig uses them as stepping-stones to go get the mermaid. But his attention slips for a second and he gets swallowed by one of the whales.

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: King Neptune's Court
programme.desc: While off jogging, King Neptune spots the mermaid and falls head over heels in love with her. Marina is rather flattered...but as far as Sharko is concerned, no way is that Don Juan of the seas going to hang around his beloved mermaid!

programme.title: Bangkok Fight Nights: Episode 4
programme.desc: Thousands flock to witness the incredible Muay Thai events put on by Bangkok Fight Night every week. The combination of the unique location, hard hitting action and curious onlookers make Bangkok Fight Night an unforgettable experience.

programme.desc: Thousands flock to witness the incredible Muay Thai events put on by Bangkok Fight Night every week. The combination of the unique location, hard hitting action and curious onlookers make Bangkok Fight Night an unforgettable experience.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League: SCL Norway - World strongest Viking

programme.title: Strongman Champions League: SCL Holland

programme.title: Strongman Champions League: SCL Latvia
programme.desc: Last year in Latvia saw the first SCL win for local ‘Titan’ Dainis Zageris. This year Lauri Nami joins the starting list, back after last year’s injury in Romania, as well as World champion in Log lifting Vidas Blekaitis and the yellow shirt holder.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League

programme.title: Strongman Champions League: SCL Bulgaria

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 154

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 216

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 119

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 198
programme.desc: Can a mattress cushion the impact of a long fall onto water? Are stone cannonballs as deadly as steel ones?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 36

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 177
programme.desc: Can mirrors be used to reflect sunlight and illuminate a tomb, as depicted in "The Mummy?" Can a runaway car be safely stopped if another driver pulls in front and slows down?

programme.title: Fear Factor: Hearse Slide, Psycho Shower Rescue
programme.desc: In a couples' stunt, a hearse with a standing platform replacing the rear bumper will be used. One contestant will be handcuffed to a shower inside a bathroom at the Bates Motel in this episode, part 2 of Fear Factor's Psycho special!

programme.title: Fear Factor: Exploding Room, Eating Camel Spiders
programme.desc: Contestants will be trapped in a nightmare office and eat camel spiders as well as perform timed escapes from straitjackets in this episode, part 3 of Fear Factor's Psycho-themed special!

programme.title: Fear Factor: Heli Platform To Platform Jump, Fear Factor Barbershop, Container Launch
programme.desc: Contestants pair up with complete strangers to maneuver a speeding boat beneath a helicopter and escape a small cage submerged in freezing water.
programme.sub-title: Heli Platform To Platform Jump, Fear Factor Barbershop, Container Launch

programme.title: Fear Factor: Ledge Piggy Back, Mother's Kitchen, Under The Semi Sunroof Escape
programme.desc: Parents make their way across the ledge at Universal Orlando while their children stand on their shoulders. Mother-son teams must retrieve keys. Contestants sit in a car and must lock it into position underneath a moving semi-truck.
programme.sub-title: Ledge Piggy Back, Mother's Kitchen, Under The Semi Sunroof Escape

programme.title: Fear Factor: Chair Launch Heli Partner Pluck, Alligator Frog Box, Quad Off Pier
programme.desc: One contestant will launch herself from a pneumatic chair into water. One contestant will drop from a helicopter and swim over to a buoy with a key on it and more in this "Freaks vs. Geeks" episode of Fear Factor.
programme.sub-title: Chair Launch Heli Partner Pluck, Alligator Frog Box, Quad Off Pier

programme.title: Fear Factor: Demolition Derby, Swamp Course
programme.desc: Reality stars: Part 1! Five contestants will be seated in derby cars while their partners balance on top of 30-foot poles. The contestants will also maneuver a swamp boat using a gondolier's staff through a swamp obstacle course.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Houseboat Rescue, Submerged Bug Box Escape
programme.desc: Reality stars, part 2! Contestants will both start on a SeaDoo as they speed towards a buoy, jump off at the buoy, grab a floating fire extinguisher, and swim to a platform behind a house boat that is on fire in one dangerous stunt.
programme.sub-title: Houseboat Rescue, Submerged Bug Box Escape

programme.title: Fear Factor: A Car Crane Collision, Spider Dive
programme.desc: Both contestants are trapped in cars that are each suspended by cranes opposing each other. The female contestant will be locked to a conveyer belt that will be lowered into a shaft filled with hundreds of webs crawling with thousands of tarantulas.
programme.sub-title: A Car Crane Collision, Spider Dive

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Big Boost
programme.desc: When a ferry breakdown causes a gasoline shortage, Duane begs Chuck to return and prepare the Electra for a fuel haul. Cory leads a rescue mission to retrieve an abandoned C-46 and Mikey escapes to Ottawa for a birthday joyride in a fighter jet.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Power Struggle
programme.desc: Duane lands a huge contract for the Electra and puts enormous pressure on mechanic Adam to prep the plane without the help of his mentor Chuck. Kelly plans her Mexican wedding, but Jynelle's sudden resignation leaves her in the lurch.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Top of the World
programme.desc: The Electra flies to Alert, the northernmost settlement on Earth, forcing Adam and Duane to work things out. Hay River rampie Tyler is on the fast track to a co-pilot seat, but first has to prove his flying ability to Buffalo's new chief pilot, Justin.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Last Days
programme.desc: Sparks fly when Joe discovers Gord has taken a job with a rival airline after completing expensive training on one of the Buffalo planes. Larry, a rookie rampie, makes a near fatal error while training on the C-46.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Push Comes to Shove
programme.desc: Trying to make his mark at Buffalo, Duane lands two more Electra contracts. But his over- zealous efforts result in a clash with the crew and with Joe, and a down-to-the-wire midnight departure to meet a deadline.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: The Doghouse
programme.desc: Duane's decision to leave the Electra crew unsupervised while he spends time at home jeopardizes the completion of a major contract. Young DC-3 co-pilot Graeme sees his chance to move up to a bigger plane disappear when he falls out of favour with Joe.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Ice Strip
programme.desc: Mechanic Jimmy is sent to a northern mining camp to create an ice landing strip on a remote lake where AJ will have to land a DC-3 and the much bigger C-46. New co-pilot Tyler faces the ultimate test - flying the sked with Joe.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Expect the Unexpected
programme.desc: Engine troubles on the C-46 during the valley run force Devan to shut down an engine. High winds wreak havoc for Devan and his crew on another C-46 mission to help clean up an oil spill in the Northwest Territories.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Soccer - ninja style!
programme.desc: With Nathan still on the team, for now, the Raimon 11 can move forward and concentrate on the Nationals.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Jude's decision!
programme.desc: The narrow victory over Shuriken has given Raimon confidence, but on the other side of the tournament there’s shock and awe at Royal’s complete destruction at the hands of Zeus Jr.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Break the unbreakable wall!
programme.desc: With their firepower boosted by the addition of Jude Sharp, the team are ready to tackle Farm Jr High and their unbreakable defence. But unless they get their passes coordinated then all their hard work will come to nothing!

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The reincarnated genius!
programme.desc: Erik the Eagle is back! Like a phoenix he has risen from the ashes and come back to visit his old friend. Just in time too, Raimon Jr are desperate for some new moves, and the Tri Pegasus is just what they need. But can they perfect it in time?

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The killer Triangle Z!
programme.desc: Raimon Jr are getting ready to play their next big opponent - Kirkwood Jr High, which just happens to be Axel Blaze’s old school.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The clash with Kirkwood Jr. High!
programme.desc: The Murdock brothers and their grudge are dominating Raimon Jr. at every turn, but they need to find the strength to overcome their malice if they’re going to make it to the final. If they don’t work together, their dream is finished!
programme.sub-title: The clash with Kirkwood Jr. High!

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Go beyond the God Hand!
programme.desc: Raimon Jr. are through to the finals, but they’re all getting nervous about playing the terrifying Zeus Jr. Mark is convinced he’s not good enough, and if that weren’t enough to rattle nerves

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: A challenge from a God!
programme.desc: As the final against Zeus draws nearer, so does Raimon Jr’s anticipation and dread. The team are working hard, but the level they have to reach seems beyond their grasp. Will they get it together in time for the final?

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Time for training camp!
programme.desc: The big game is almost on top of them but Mark still hasn’t mastered Majin the Hand. The coach decides to try and new tactic and everyone spends the night at school at a sleepover training camp.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The final battle!
programme.desc: This is it, the final of the Nationals has arrived. Zeus Jr. storm to an early lead and nothing Raimon Jr does has any effect on them. Are they really gods? Or is something else going on?

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: God vs Majin!
programme.desc: Raimon Jr. are down by three goals and are getting clobbered by the soccer gods of Zeus Jr. The situation looks completely hopeless and the clock is running down.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Aliens Are Here!
programme.desc: The victory for the Raimon 11 proves to be very short lived, as only a few minutes after their win, the sky falls in. Literally! - All of a sudden the earth is overrun by aliens!

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Raimon 11 Fight Back!
programme.desc: The Raimon 11 have stepped up to try and save the world against the soccer players of Alius Academy, but it’s like pitting an ant against an elephant.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Take Down the Black 11!
programme.desc: The president has been kidnapped by aliens, and Mark and the others are determined to help him. The Inazuma Caravan travels to the park where he was kidnapped, ready to beat the aliens off.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Alius Academy Threat
programme.desc: The tenacious Raimon 11 players never give up, and they’re going to try again against Alius Academy. But try as they might they can't even hold a candle to them.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Search for the Legendary Striker!
programme.desc: The news that Axel is kicked off the team doesn’t go over well with most of the Raimon players, especially Kevin Dragonfly.
programme.sub-title: The Search for the Legendary Striker!

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly takes Haskell on a practice date, and finds herself blown away by Haskell's hidden talents. Stuart embarrasses Phil when he tries way too hard to fit in with Phil's friends.

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: The Greatest American Hero: Operation Spoilsport

programme.title: The Greatest American Hero: Don't Mess Around with Jim
programme.desc: Ralph and Bill are kidnapped by a tycoon who fakes his own death...and seems to know more about the suit than they do.

programme.title: The Greatest American Hero: Hog Wild
programme.desc: Ralph tries to save himself and a town from a rampaging motorcycle gang.

programme.title: Baroness Von Sketch Show
programme.desc: The all-female comedy series is created by and stars veteran Canadian actor Meredith MacNeill and Second City alumni Carolyn Taylor, Aurora Browne and Jennifer Whalen, who satirize modern life's everyday concerns.

programme.title: Titanic II
programme.desc: On the 100th anniversary of the original voyage, a luxury liner follows the path of its namesake. But when a tsunami hurls an ice berg into the new ship's path, the passengers and crew must fight to avoid a similar fate.

programme.title: Megafault
programme.desc: A seismologist and a miner must stop a massive earthquake that threatens to tear the world in half.

programme.title: San Andreas Quake
programme.desc: When a discredited L.A. Seismologist warns of an impending 12.7 earthquake, no one takes her seriously. Now on her own, she races desperately to get her family to safety before the earthquake breaks Los Angeles apart from the mainland.

programme.title: Sunday School Musical
programme.desc: Two competing groups of high school students must rally together and enter a song and dance competition in order to save their church from closing.

programme.title: Asteroid VS Earth
programme.desc: When a shower of massive meteors threatens Earth's inhabitants with extinction, the worlds greatest minds devise a dangerous plan that will tilt the planet off its axis to avoid the impact.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Secret Spirits at The Old Market Tavern - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Altrincham, Greater Manchester to investigate The Old Market Tavern. Once used as a coaching inn and a court house, many spirits still lurk here and Sean captures one of the most clearest EVP's ever.
programme.sub-title: Secret Spirits at The Old Market Tavern - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Secret Spirits at The Old Market Tavern - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his paranormal investigation at The Old Market Tavern and he appears to have attracted the attention of spirit that launches a physical attack on him. Will he survive the night?
programme.sub-title: Secret Spirits at The Old Market Tavern - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo
programme.desc: Sean heads to Astley Green to the infamous Astley Green Colliery Museum. So many reports of paranormal activity have been confirmed at the mine, from lost miners to tormented souls.
programme.sub-title: Digging Deep Astley Green Colliery Museum - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Digging Deep Astley Green Colliery Museum - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation into Astley Green Colliery Museum and attempts to make further contact with the souls and spirits who have lost their lives there. Will he succeed?
programme.sub-title: Digging Deep Astley Green Colliery Museum - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Historic Hauntings of Whittington Castle - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Oswestry to investigate claims of hauntings at a castle thousands of years old, and believed to be haunted by an angry judge. Will any of the souls that departed here come out to play?
programme.sub-title: Historic Hauntings of Whittington Castle - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Historic Hauntings of Whittington Castle - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of the castle and attempts to make contact with the spirit world. It appears he is not alone.
programme.sub-title: Historic Hauntings of Whittington Castle - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: 14 Ghosts of The Bate Hall
programme.desc: Sean heads to Macclesfield, Cheshire to investigate a building said to be haunted by 14 ghosts and also the lost soul of a witch. With so many spirits in one of the oldest public houses in the UK, will any of the ghosts join him tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Haunting of The Sad Cavalier at The Ring O Bells - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Middleton, Manchester to investigate claims that a sad cavalier named Edward is haunting this location. Ring O Bells has also been used for druid rituals. Will he be able to summon any spirits tonight?
programme.sub-title: Haunting of The Sad Cavalier at The Ring O Bells - Part 1

programme.title: Popeye: New Adventures: Swee'Pea Plagues a Parade

programme.title: Popeye: New Adventures: Paddle Wheel Popeye

programme.title: Popeye: New Adventures: Merry Madness at the Mardi Gras
programme.desc: Popeye and Olive Oil try to decide what costumes to wear for the Mardi Gras. Bluto, dressed first as an ape and then as a knight, fools Olive Oil into thinking he is Popeye in disguise.
programme.sub-title: Merry Madness at the Mardi Gras

programme.title: Popeye: New Adventures: Popeye of Sherwood Forest

programme.title: Popeye: New Adventures: Peask and Quiet

programme.title: Popeye: New Adventures: Spa-ing Partners
programme.desc: Olive Oil has opened a health spa and both Popeye and Bluto are applying for the job of instructor.

programme.title: Popeye: New Adventures: Ships that Pass in The Fright

programme.sub-title: Ships that Pass in The Fright

programme.title: Popeye: New Adventures: Popeye's Self Defense
programme.desc: Popeye, at Olive Oil's insistence decides to take an exercise class so that he can be strong without spinach, only to discover that Bluto is the instructor.

programme.title: Popeye: New Adventures: Pappy Falls in Love
programme.desc: Pappy and Bluto pursue the same woman while on an ocean cruise. They try to outdo the other to win her.

programme.title: Popeye: New Adventures: Popeye of The Jungle
programme.desc: Popeye tells Swee'Pea a bedtime story where the hero is "Popeye of the Jungle." Bwana Bluto is a hunter who comes across a napping Popeye of the Jungle and his mate Jungle Olive.

programme.title: Popeye: New Adventures: The Umpire Strikes Back
programme.desc: It is the bottom of the ninth, the home team is down 49-0, Olive Oil steps up to bat and Bluto is pitching. She strikes out.

programme.title: Popeye: New Adventures: W.O.I.L.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Attack of the Killer Spuds
programme.desc: An alien invasion turns Riverdale teenagers into zonedout couch potatoes, while sentient space potatoes mutate to replace them as vegetable zombies.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Me Me Me!
programme.desc: Reluctantly preparing donations to the local museum for her father, whiny and selfcentered Veronica gets a taste of her own medicine when she wishes that everyone be like me.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Driven to Distraction
programme.desc: Archie buys a pair of mystical fuzzy dice for his beloved car, Betsy, and unwittingly brings her to life when he hangs the dice on her rearview mirror.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: 37-year-old Martin works on the night shift as a Fire Engineer for London Underground. Christine is a 21 year old student who lives at home in Manchester with her mum and younger sister.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: 27 year old Marketing Consultant Ameer is looking for love and has never been in a relationship. 18 year old Georgetta has been modelling and dancing since she was a baby.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Football fan Wayne works as a Customer Services Advisor. He is desperate to lose weight so he can play his favourite sport. Martin is a 32 year works as a photographer, PR manager and model.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Keith is a 33 year old dance floor DJ who is desperate for a date. 25 year old BT Manager Tiffany despises ‘bad’ foods. She has a strong desire to be healthy but has a very small appetite.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: 22 year old mum and part time call centre worker Heather is desperate to curb her enormous appetite. 19 year old Charlotte's dream is to be worshipped for being beautiful.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Dr Christian Jessen and Anna Richardson return for a second run of the diet magazine show which tackles the nation’s relationship with food.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 12
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin see a mid terrace in need of a complete overhaul in Chatham, Kent; there's a flat in a gothic-style Victorian house in Sydenham, London with delusions of grandeur and a pair of semis with some potential subsidance in Fenham, Newcastle.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 9
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin see an end of terrace in Ilkeston near Derby; a plot of land with planning consent in industrial Leyton in East London; and in the Wiltshire village of Atworth a tiny cottage with low ceilings, a wild garden and plenty of little secrets.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander view properties in Plymouth, Buckinghamshire and London.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 24

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 17
programme.desc: We visit a picturesque cottage in Newquay that draws plenty of attention at auction. In Stockport, there's an office block up for auction which could be great and in Kent, there's a three bedroom end terrace house in a good area.

programme.title: The Brain That Wouldn't Die

programme.title: The Revenge of Frankenstein

programme.title: Dazzle

programme.title: Nosferatu
programme.desc: Vampire Count Orlok expresses interest in a new residence and real estate agent Hutter's wife.

programme.title: Fantastic Planet

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy: Campania

programme.title: The Urban Vegetarian: Meals on the Go

programme.title: Hunter: Any Second Now
programme.desc: A concert pianist is paralyzed by fear when a man jailed for her attempted murder is released from prison and vows to complete the task.

programme.title: Hunter: Hot Pursuit - Part 2

programme.title: Hunter: Playing God
programme.desc: After learning the circumstances leading up to the murder of a notorious Latino crime boss, Hunter and McCall face an ethical dilemma: whether to arrest the killer or let him go free.

programme.title: Hunter: The Jade Woman

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Psychopathic killers lurk in society, mostly acting alone. Sometimes fate brings them into contact with another person who shares their cold power to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While marriage is meant to be for life, it often ends in divorce. These wives took their marriages vow seriously: "till death do us part."

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The path towards revenge can sometimes lead to murder. It can be quick, fiery and violent. It can also be a dish served cold, the product of a calm, calculated plot.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: We want to believe that all women would give their lives to protect their children. But there are horrifying cases when a mother will turn against her natural instinct and kill her own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Blood ties are strong ties, sometimes strong enough to pull a person into a murderous conspiracy. When a family member wields his or her power, the result can be death.

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women: Married to Murder

programme.title: The FBI Files: Brutal Abduction
programme.desc: A Chicago street gang thought they had figured out how to kidnap people for ransom again and again, and never get caught. But their one mistake was they underestimated the Federal Bureau of Investigation.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Coffee Shop Murders
programme.desc: At a coffee shop in Washington, DC, three employees were shot to death. Evidence at the crime scene pointed in many different directions. Was this a hate crime, a robbery gone wrong or an act of cold-blooded vengeance?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Backstage Murder
programme.desc: In the 1980's, two partners created a nightclub that would bring them wealth and international fame. The male strip club phenomenon promised female patrons fun and excitement. But the bright lights hid a dark side.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Death In The Delta
programme.desc: When a wealthy young woman was abducted in front of her in-laws' home, the police had no shortage of suspects. The 25-year-old victim left behind a tumultuous marriage, an ex-husband and old boyfriends. All were on the FBI's short list.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In 1984, a tragic murder led agents into the frightening world of domestic terrorism. Law enforcement vowed to dismantle the violent faction that claimed responsibility.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Heist
programme.desc: In Arizona, an armored van loaded with cash failed to reach its destination. Authorities suspected an inside job. When the vehicle was recovered with the drivers and the cash missing, those suspicions grew even more.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Lost Boys
programme.desc: In June of 1997, a crime wave swept Iowa like a tornado. It left a trail of robbery, kidnapping, and murder in its wake, and then it moved on. No one knew where.

programme.title: A Haunting: Sallie’s House
programme.desc: Deb and Tony’s son is born and his toys take on a life of their own.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Total creep out!"
programme.desc: The Are You Haunted team is back this time with a rather unusual haunted venue, providing a very uneasy atmosphere. With reports of phantom footsteps, unexplained voices, and a full apparition. But what will the team uncover for themselves?

programme.title: A Haunting: A Haunting in Ireland
programme.desc: The Fahey family’s new addition stirs up psychic energy of a crime committed years ago.

programme.title: A Haunting: Hidden Terror
programme.desc: After Mike and Lisa move in their new house, Lisa’s personality begins to change dramatically.

programme.title: A Haunting: Nightmare In The Attic
programme.desc: The Fox family moves into a large old house in Lowell, Arkansas. Soon after, an angry ghost and demon begin to target the children, in their waking hours and in their dreams. The Fox family turns to a psychic, who confirms their worst nightmares.

programme.title: A Haunting: Eternal Grief
programme.desc: Shortly after moving into her home in Indiana, Jennifer Patterson receives a warning from a stranger that she is not alone in the house. When she hears strange voices, she begins to wonder if the previous owner, who died in the house, still inhabits it.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Lake Club Horror
programme.desc: The Lake Club is transformed into a rock n roll nightclub with mysterious happenings.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Protector
programme.desc: A mother and daughter both believe their house is haunted. But while the mother believes it's the spirit of her murdered boyfriend, her daughter believes it's much darker. Paranormal experts investigate and uncover an epic battle between good and evil.

programme.title: IFISH: Mangrove Jack - The Kimberley, NT
programme.desc: Paul Worsteling: "Few days fishing actually live up to their expectation, let alone exceed them." / Jet Worsteling: "Best days fishing I've ever had and at the coolest spot."

programme.title: IFISH: Large Mouth Nannygai - Arafura Charters, NT
programme.desc: Charlotte Klose knows her way around a monster Barra up the deadliest creeks the NT has to offer - so how will she fair over 100 nautical miles out to sea? Pretty bloody well - that's HOW! Come along for a days fishing that some could only dream of!
programme.sub-title: Large Mouth Nannygai - Arafura Charters, NT

programme.title: IFISH: Mulloway - Botany Bay, NSW
programme.desc: Ever wondered why Captain Cook chose to first land on the southern banks of Botany Bay on Sunday 29th April 1770? Because the fishing is so hot! The fish were coming in so thick and fast the boys had to take a break...

programme.title: IFISH: Australian Salmon - Port Lincoln, SA
programme.desc: Local knowledge is always best, so when young Archie from Port Lincoln told me we were gonna smash some BIG Australian Salmon off the beach - I knew I was in for one hell of a day!

programme.title: IFISH: Spanish Mackerel - Namotu Island, Fiji
programme.desc: The apple doesn't fall far from the tree. Down rigging big live baits, deep dropping for monsters of the deep and popping for those massive surface strikes - what more could Jet and I ask for!

programme.title: IFISH: Black Bream - Bemm River, VIC
programme.desc: Traditionally bream fishing is a game of bait and wait... well not if Franks around! Local East Gippsland guru, Frank Milito, gives PW a lesson in using vibes for BIG Bemm River bream, that you really must see!

programme.title: IFISH: Sailfish - Darwin, NT
programme.desc: When Paul hears the word "Darwin", two things come to mind - Barra and Crocs! So when PW got invited to fish for sailfish, in 20m of water, he couldn't say no! Get out your note pad and pen, because you're about to learn how you can do it all yourself!

programme.title: IFISH: Barramundi, Horizontal Falls, WA
programme.desc: There is only one thing better than waking up in the remote pristine wilderness of the Kimberley - and that's fishing it! Join the Worsteling tribe as they navigate their way through dense mangrove systems in search of the mighty BARRAMUNDI!

programme.title: IFISH: Yellowtail Kingfish, Jervis Bay, NSW
programme.desc: "Catch the fresh bait, get the BIG fish!" Join the team for a step by step lesson in down rigging fresh baits for big angry Kings!

programme.title: IFISH: Barramundi, Daly River and Cullen Bay, NT
programme.desc: Can't decide whether you're a barra or blue water kinda person? Well, put your worries behind you, because this week, we've got it all!
programme.sub-title: Barramundi, Daly River and Cullen Bay, NT

programme.title: IFISH: Mako Shark, St Helens, TAS
programme.desc: One has a shell and the other big teeth. One swims the open oceans while the other crawls beneath. One makes me lick my lips while the other has me scared. I'd only get in the water with one - even if I was dared!

programme.title: IFISH: Ballarat, VIC & Nomatu Is. FIJI
programme.desc: From VIC to Fiji in just 30 minutes.

programme.title: IFISH: Hawkesbury River, NSW
programme.desc: "There's an old saying that every pound of jewfish you catch, you need to spend at least one hour fishing for them." This is true in most cases... unless you're fishing with Wayne "Mulloway" Annetts!

programme.title: IFISH: ATA Lodge, Alagnak River, Alaska
programme.desc: Have you ever dreamed of fishing somewhere so fish rich, that the thousands of fish create one big black mass? Well. come along to ATA Lodge in the remote Alaskan wilderness and get ready for... The Black Hole!

programme.title: IFISH: Wyangala Dam, New South Wales
programme.desc: Whether you want to troll lures for cod, collect your own live bait and target yellas, or battle huge mud marlin on small soft plastics - Wyangala Dam is the place to be.

programme.title: IFISH: Daly River, Northern Territory
programme.desc: When I asked Shane Compain to pick the best day of the year for myself and the IFISH Team to come smack some serious barramundi - he did not disappoint!

programme.title: IFISH: Hinchinbrook Region, Queensland
programme.desc: It's not often that you go fishing somewhere so picturesque, so pristine and so untouched that you seriously think to yourself "I wouldn't even care if I didn't get a bite"... but then you absolutely SMACK IT TOO!

programme.title: IFISH: ATA Lodge, Alagnak River, Alaska
programme.desc: When Paul says he guarantee's you won't be disappointed, he ain't lying! Landing monster mutilated hook-jaw zombie chum salmon on fly, while bears patrol the banks, fishing around you. It's gotta be seen to be believed!

programme.desc: A young man just released from prison is determined to go straight. However, his efforts are being sabotaged by his girlfriend's brother, a gambler who has massive gambling debts.

programme.desc: Johnny Ringo and Curly Bill Brocius, outraged over crooked Sheriff Behan taxing the money they make on some of their illegal activities enlist Doc Holliday to frame the Sheriff.

programme.title: The Truth is in the Stars

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Cold War & The Start of the Space Race - Cold War rivalry and the acceleration of space exploration. Servicing Hubble - Preparations for Hubble's final servicing mission. Chasing a Comet - Launch and the difficult path to rendezvous.
programme.sub-title: The Space Race, The Hubble, Chasing Comets & Space Debris

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Mercury Begins - The start of NASA & America's first manned space program. Mars Express - The European Space Agency's Mars Satellite. The Soyuz Launch System - The gradual evolution of Russia's Soyuz launcher.
programme.sub-title: Project Mercury, The Mars Express & The Soyuz Launch System

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Mercury Advances - America's first manned space program finally puts a man in orbit. Camera Tracking - The array of special cameras that follow a spacecraft at launch. The International Space Station - The building and operation.
programme.sub-title: Project Mercury Advancement, Camera Tracking & The International Space Station

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Gemini Commences - Did Gemini give the US a lead in the space race? Venus Express - The last days of ESA's Venus probe. EMU - NASA's Extravehicular Mobility Unit. Deep Space Communications - ESA's worldwide network of giant dishes.
programme.sub-title: Project Gemini, Venus Express, EMU & Deep Space Communication

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Gemini Advances - NASA refines the techniques needed for rendezvous. Cassini at Saturn - In the Cassini probe's final years of activity, its handlers are asking it to do more complex and risky assignments.
programme.sub-title: Project Gemini Advances, Cassini at Saturn & More About Mars

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Gemini: Docking and EVA - In the final phase of the Gemini program NASA struggles with docking and spacewalks. Curiosity Roving Mars - On the surface of Mars the Curiosity rover is changing the way we think about the red planet.
programme.sub-title: Project Gemini Docking, Mars Curiousity & Satellite Swarms

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Apollo Program Begins - At the very beginning of NASA's moon project things go wrong. Caves - ESA's special training program for astronauts. Planck - Mapping the cosmic microwave background radiation.
programme.sub-title: The Apollo Program Begins, Caves & Planck

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Rebuilding Project Apollo - After the Apollo 1 disaster NASA resumes manned space flight. Orbiting Carbon Observatory 2 - Monitoring the Earth's Co2 levels in unprecedented detail. Zero Gravity Training - Parabolic flights.
programme.sub-title: Rebuilding Apollo, Orbiting Carbon & Zero Gravity Training

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Beyond Earth Orbit - The Apollo program takes bold new steps. IXV Re-entry Vehicle - Europe is working to perfect a re-entry vehicle. Galileo Satellites Lost and Found - Navigation satellites go into incorrect orbit.
programme.sub-title: Beyond Earth Orbit, IXV Vehicles & Galileo Satellites Lost and Found

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: To the Moon - The Apollo program achieves its major objective. Dragon, Falcon and Spacex - New directions in re-usable spacecraft. Gaia- Mapping our galaxy in unprecedented detail.
programme.sub-title: To The Moon, SpaceX's Dragon and Falcon & GAIA

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Beginning of the End - After the first Moon landing the Apollo science program was about to start in earnest but people were losing interest. Apollo Gets Complicated - New technology is added that extends the reach of the Apollo program.
programme.sub-title: The Beginning of the End, Apollo Gets Complicated & The End of Apollo

programme.title: Duel of Ultimate Weapons

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Love on the Run
programme.desc: Today Dog finds himself looking for more than one fugitive. He starts the day looking for a woman who has skipped out on her court date. But he soon learns that she has teamed up with a woman whose criminal exploits have attracted the local media.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Jump Start
programme.desc: Dog gave a break to a young man with a drug problem who promised to enter drug rehab. But this commitment to rehabilitation seems to have ended when he bolted from the car on the way to the drug treatment center and went on the run.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Ice Man
programme.desc: Dog's latest fugitive doesn't think small when it comes to illegal drugs: he was carrying almost a pound of meth when he was arrested. Now he's on the run with his pregnant girlfriend on the high plains of Colorado.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Trouble in Paradise
programme.desc: Dog is back in Hawaii and tracking a dangerous fugitive through the jungles of the Big Island. Their prey is being protected by a ring of family and friends that Dog must forcefully confront to bring in his man.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Girl Power
programme.desc: When Dog decides to spend the day caring for his newest granddaughter, Beth enlists the girls to hunt down a female fugitive. Heading into a dangerous part of town the ladies will use their feminine wiles to track this mother gone wrong.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Prodigal Son
programme.desc: Dog and his old friends, Tim Chapman and Sonny Westbrook are riding with the team, so their target, a thief with violent tendencies, is out of luck. When Dog learns that the fugitive is also a disrespectful son, he is more motivated to find his man.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Family Ties
programme.desc: Dog doesn't have the whole team today and he's got to catch a fugitive with a record of criminal assault. But when Dog finds the fugitive's former girlfriend, she thinks he isn't dangerous at all.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Special Delivery
programme.desc: For months, this fugitive has been stringing Leland along with a series of barely believable excuses. Out of patience, Leland calls in the Big Dog. The whole team heads out to put pressure on the family and friends of the fugitive.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Surface Scratches
programme.desc: Dog's latest quarry is running from abuse and assault charges. As Dog investigates, he discovers that this fugitive has gamed the system by jumping from one bond, and one bondsman, to another.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Great Debate
programme.desc: When the co-signer of a bond is also romantically involved with the defendant, sometimes the bondman is put in the middle of a lover's quarrel.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Facebooked
programme.desc: Dog is in Denver helping Bobby Brown to track down a fugitive with a long rap sheet. But unfortunately they have no picture of the felon to work with, so the challenges are big on this one. But Dog discovers a new source; "Facebook".

programme.desc: When the duck guys have to pull an all-nighter to finish some work, Willie decides he wants to join them. But when a dying smoke detector distracts them from their work, Jase and Willie head off to disarm it.

programme.desc: After visiting a popular burger restaurant, Willie and Jase get into a debate over which of them cooks the best burger, prompting them to challenge one another to a cooking contest.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: G.I. Si
programme.desc: When Willie and Jase argue over an old G.I. Joe toy, it leads them into a debate over who would make a better soldier. To settle the score, Willie and Jase head out to the woods with their friends and children for a paintball match.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Fowl Playhouse
