programme.title: Duck Dynasty: De-Bug Life
programme.desc: The guys realize it is time for the annual cleaning of the duck blinds when they come across a gator using one as a home. Meanwhile, while the kids are running the church car wash, Si and Willie disagree on the best way to draw in customers.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Men vs. Wild
programme.desc: Brotherly competition is taken to a whole new level when Jase and Willie challenge Alan and Jep to a survival race through the woods on Phil's property. Meanwhile, Si is interested in finding a new hobby when he sees Kay cutting coupons.

programme.title: Ax Men: High Wire Act
programme.desc: In Louisiana, Shelby looks to repair his custom made two-ton swamp buggy. In Alaska, Coatsy returns to the Papac worksite. In the Pacific Northwest, the Rygaard crew must climb over a hundred feet in the air to top a new lift tree.

programme.title: American Hoggers: Before the Storm
programme.desc: After winning last season's showdown, Jerry Campbell is the Hog Boss in Texas. Business is booming, but Krystal, Robert and Lea aren't seeing any of the profits.

programme.title: American Hoggers: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Campbell. Meanwhile, the reigning Hog Boss, Jerry Campbell, finds himself under attack when a fleeing sow runs into his Jeep--but the pigs aren't the only ones coming after Jerry. Krystal is at her wits end with her father's behavior.

programme.title: American Hoggers: Separate Ways
programme.desc: Krystal and Lea commit to their decision to quit Jerry and team Campbell and start their own business.

programme.title: American Hoggers: To Catch a Pig
programme.desc: Ronnie Creek can't get his truck unstuck, or his crew to come help him--they're fed up with his obsession over an elusive 500lb hog.

programme.title: American Hoggers: Turf War
programme.desc: The girls are off to another job, and meet a couple who claim they've spotted Bigfoot on their land. While on the hunt, the girls hear something suspicious, and as Lea pulls her gun, Jerry busts out of the brush in the Jeep.

programme.title: American Hoggers: Hog Blocking
programme.desc: The Campbells and Wild Women Hoggers continue to muscle over the same ranch.

programme.title: American Hoggers: Stuck in the Mud
programme.desc: Jerry and Robert aren't budging off the Bigfoot ranch, and Krystal and Lea aren't happy about it.

programme.title: American Hoggers: Heartache
programme.desc: Riding high after their success on the Bigfoot job, and frustrated with Jerry's constant sabotage, Krystal and Lea take a huge gamble by moving their hog hunting operation to Florida.

programme.title: American Hoggers: Turning Point
programme.desc: Jerry is left pondering his future as a hog hunter. Tom, Lea and Krystal meet with a dog trainer client whose stock is threatened by hogs.

programme.title: American Hoggers: Swamped
programme.desc: Krystal and Lea clash with Tom Walker while helping a cow rancher protect his herd, driving a wedge between them.

programme.title: American Hoggers: The Replacement
programme.desc: In Florida, Tom surprises the girls with some news: he's bringing in his friend Dynamite to help with the workload, and Krystal and Lea are forced to hunt alone with a sluggish vehicle and unfamiliar dogs.

programme.title: Cabin Truckers: 4 Ton Fireplace In Tow!
programme.desc: Alton and Jessica Puddicombe received a call of a lifetime when his neighbor reached out the day of their wedding and offered them his 1932 farmhouse.

programme.title: Cabin Truckers: Oversized Garage Coming!
programme.desc: Peter and Sheena Rector have seven children with three kids sharing a bedroom, it’s simply not enough space.

programme.title: Cabin Truckers: Midnight Mud Race
programme.desc: Ian and Cindy have finally found their dream location but moving their stunning new property proves messier than expected.

programme.title: Judge Dad: Splish Your Frock
programme.desc: Tiffany claims Kendra intentionally spilled a glass of red wine on her white dress. Kendra says she was merely trying to get back to her seat. Defendant says Tiffany had no business being in that section, therefore she owes her nothing.

programme.title: Divorce Court: Lonely Nights
programme.desc: Christina says Ramon is a cheater, runs from his financial responsibilities and their sex life is in the gutter. He’s tired of her enabling his family to the point, he takes refuge in hotel rooms to get a break from her.

programme.title: Divorce Court: Tapped Out
programme.desc: Lataisha says Chris smokes weed all day and can’t keep a job. Things seemed to be going fine until one day she walked downstairs in their home and realized that Chris moved out. Chris says he left because she is too aggressive.

programme.title: Divorce Court: Player of the Year
programme.desc: Jordan says that Taurean is the biggest player with the ladies and still decides to lie about it even after she gave him a chance to have an open relationship. He says he talks to other women because Jordan is unaffectionate and verbally abusive.

programme.title: Divorce Court: Players Club
programme.desc: When this couple met on the internet, they instantly hit it off. Though, when Ray found out Raina was creating sexy videos for pay, he wasn’t so keen. He believes that she is meeting up with her followers and having relations for more money.

programme.title: Divorce Court: Tardy for the Party
programme.desc: Dashia says William is a cheater and spends most of his money on alcohol instead of paying the bills. William says Dashia is sneaky, belittles him, has trust issues and allows her family to interfere in their relationship.

programme.title: Divorce Court: Computer Love
programme.desc: As soon as this couple got engaged their romance hit the rocks. Brandi says that Brittanie can’t tell the truth if her life depended on it. Brittanie says Brandi’s insecurities and lack of trust has had a severe effect on their relationship.

programme.title: Divorce Court: Done Done
programme.desc: Nichele says Stewart would pay the neighbors to spy on her. She says he was never supportive when it came to parenting. Stewart says Nichele has always denied cheating on him but he believes in his heart she did.

programme.title: Divorce Court: Brexit
programme.desc: Over 17 years of marriage Leon has had countless affairs with other women and Siobhan has had it. She claims all he wants is for her to keep his house clean and pick up after him. Leon argues that the problems stem from Siobhan’s bad drinking habits.

programme.title: Divorce Court: Dead Weight
programme.desc: They say opposites attract, but Betty is starting to feel weighed down by David. David is lazy and disrespectful for how broke he is all the time. Betty no longer wants to be tied down by being with someone who is always unemployed and lies about it.

programme.title: Divorce Court: King of Kings
programme.desc: Joel claims he is a king looking for his queen. He says that him and Jerrica would succeed if she would just fall in line in his kingdom. Jerrica says she can no longer accept Joel’s list of rules and take his verbal abuse. She is ready to walk away.

programme.title: Divorce Court: Sixth Sense
programme.desc: Takashia says Brendon doesn’t approve of her friends, doesn’t trust her and is controlling. Brendon says he can’t trust Takashia because she is a nonstop attention seeker and never passes up an opportunity to flirt with men.

programme.title: Divorce Court: Blame It on the Sun
programme.desc: When Milton came into Sona’s life, all the stars were aligned but now their relationship has been out of orbit. Sona is a firm believer in astrology and zodiac signs, but this Leo can no longer tolerate the cheating ways of Milton who is an Aries.

programme.title: Divorce Court: Johnny on the Spot
programme.desc: Cornisha says Jawaun leaves for weeks at a time and returns broke and jobless. He says Cornisha is too bossy and picks fights causing him to blow up and take days away to cool down. Will they find a cooling point before their relationship melts down?

programme.title: Divorce Court: Studs Need Love Too
programme.desc: Tahani said Cymbre's jealous fits of rage has caused her to lose a job and suspects him of cheating after finding a hotel receipt! He doesn't trust her either after she cheated before. Will this couple be able to trust again or are they too far gone?

programme.title: Divorce Court: Blame It on the Alcohol
programme.desc: Nikkinba says Muriel is controlling and constantly breaking his phones. He wouldn't return Muriel's calls for days until he quit his job and said that he's leaving her to live in North Carolina. Can they settle down or will he buy a one-way ticket?

programme.title: Divorce Court: Hot Girl Summer
programme.desc: Shortly after tying the knot Diana gave Robert an ultimatum: they'd either have an open relationship or she was gone. He wants to save the marriage, but she isn't ready to compromise. Can Diana finally settle with one man, or is this really the end?

programme.title: Clubbing Experience - Series 4: Carola Pisaturo - Cocoon Stage @ We Are Fstvl
programme.desc: The talented italian Carola Pisaturo was opening the Cocoon stage at We Are Fstvl and we record 1h of her vinyl set!
programme.sub-title: Carola Pisaturo - Cocoon Stage @ We Are Fstvl

programme.title: Clubbing Experience - Series 7: Marc Houle @ Big Bang Festival 2018
programme.desc: In this episode, meet Marc Houle and his new live act at Big Bang Festival 2018! Marc Houle was performing live acts before it was cool...

programme.title: Clubbing Experience: Carl Cox @ Kappa FuturFestival
programme.desc: Techno King, Carl Cox gave a flawless set on the SEAT stage at KappaFutur festival in Italy. Oh Yes Oh Yes, do NOT miss it!

programme.title: Clubbing Experience - Series 6: Matador @ The Moon - Caprices Festival
programme.desc: In this episode, meet Matador and his melodic techno sounds from the Moon Stage at Caprices Festival in the middle of the mountains.

programme.title: Rendez-vous Series 9 - Part. 1
programme.desc:
Interviews with your favorite artists. Get to better know the artists who make you dance! Djs, we got them’ all! Rendez-vous with:
Fox Stevenson and Feint @ Rampage Frequencerz and B-Front @ ADE 2014 Chuckie @ ADE Carl Cox @ Snowbombing 2014

programme.title: Rendez-vous Series 1 - Part. 3
programme.desc: We talked to Andhim about their last album before playing at Zigzag Club Paris!

programme.title: Put Your Hands Up: Tomorrowland Winter
programme.desc: Relive the first edition of Tomorrowland Winter with our team braving the snow and storm with some good music!

programme.title: Tyler Perry's House of Payne: Stop, Shop and Roll
programme.desc: Ella's online shopping gets her in trouble. Lisa challenges Malik to stay off his phone. (S8, ep15)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's House of Payne: Paynefully Honest
programme.desc: Calvin and Miranda are in uncharted waters as they begin navigating co-parenting and Ella and a reluctant Curtis work on their intimacy. (S8, ep16)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's House of Payne: Wondering Prince
programme.desc: Lisa helps Miranda set up her online dating profile. (S8, ep17)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's House of Payne: A Little Discipline
programme.desc: Miranda demands answers when Calvin leaves their son alone with Laura for the first time. Malik has a hard time with a job offer from a company leader he believes to be a bigot. (S8, ep18)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's House of Payne: A Payneful Compromise
programme.desc: The family learns an important lesson in compromising. (S8, ep19)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's House of Payne: Fine Wine
programme.desc: As Ella is spun into Laura's web of wedding plans, Calvin realizes he may not be as ready to get married as he thought. (S8, ep20)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's House of Payne: The First Day
programme.desc: While Calvin and Laura make wedding plans, Miranda has made plans of her own. (S8, ep21)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's House of Payne: Paynful Suffering
programme.desc: As the family prepares for Janine's return, everyone and everything goes awry. (S8, ep22)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's House of Payne: Whiplash
programme.desc: The Payne family becomes concerned while searching for CJ after learning he ran into a burning building. CJ faces opposition with his job over protocol after his heroic act during a fire. (S8, ep1)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's House of Payne: A Payneful Lesson
programme.desc: Calvin goes out of his way to show Laura how wonderful their marriage will be despite what went wrong in his previous marriage. CJ has trouble accepting help while dealing with his recovery. (S8, ep2)

programme.title: Run's House: Rev's Baby Girl
programme.desc: It's time for JoJo and his group, Blackout, to hit the studio and begin recording tracks for their record. However, JoJo, Zach and Reggie are discouraged by the list of producers Latchkey Recordings has available to them.

programme.title: Run's House: Baby Comes Home
programme.desc: Rev and Justine return from visiting their adopted baby they'll soon be able to call their own. They get the family excited with the news that they will have a new sister living in the house in a few days.

programme.title: Run's House: Mind on the Road
programme.desc: Season Five kicks off when Rev Run home for a short visit in between gigs of his concert tour with good pal, Kid Rock.

programme.title: Run's House: Bonless Chicken Dinner
programme.desc: The episode begins with Rev Run on stage in what is his final performance of his tour with Kid Rock. Rev returns home and his hopes of getting his diet back on track are thwarted by Russy's new cooking hobby.

programme.title: Run's House: Pass The Frame
programme.desc: With the final mix of their debut album just around the corner, Team Blackout takes the next step in their pursuit of ultimate rap dominance: self-promotion.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Fight Party Episode
programme.desc: Suzanne's book group and Nick's boxing-match party collide in the family room on the same night, resulting in knock-out clashing.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dead Legends
programme.desc: PRS and Psychic/Medium Chip Coffey investigate the famed Hotel Conneaut in northern Pennsylvania. Heavy doors opening on their own, sightings of a boy, a bride and a menacing butcher have the hotel's staff on edge.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Mothman
programme.desc: Ryan takes his team to Point Pleasant, West Virginia to investigate his own personal holy grail of paranormal lore: the mysterious Mothman.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Ghosts of the Forgotten
programme.desc: The PRS investigation into the haunted Lake County Poor House becomes a journey through one PRS team members? troubled past.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Pet Cemetery
programme.desc: Ryan and his team investigate the bizarre haunting of a woman and her dog in Waterboro, Maine. The Labrador was chewing at her own fur and standing on guard on the bed, growling at unseen figures.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Sixth Sense
programme.desc: A worried mother calls the Paranormal Research Society to help her son Matthew, a boy who sees dead people. Matthew's story strikes a chord with team leader Ryan Buell who also experienced paranormal activity as a child.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Man
programme.desc: A grieving mother suspects her deceased son may have fallen victim to a mysterious entity called The Dark Man.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Get Out of This House
programme.desc: When an aggressive spirit stalks a young family, PRS is called in to investigate. When it is determined that the source of the haunting may have been unknowingly invited in, Ryan races to identify and hopefully defeat the entity before it's too late.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vegas
programme.desc: The PRS travels to Sin City to investigate a 14-year old medium who claims to speak to a dead girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hostage to Fear
programme.desc: P.R.S. is summoned to help a family who has been haunted for years by spirits lurking in the house. Upon arrival the team finds a family that has become prisoners in their own home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Asylum
programme.desc: PRS explores a New York State Prison that was once a mental asylum. Ryan and his team go behind bars to uncover the institution's paranormal past and present.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Room & Board
programme.desc: The owners of a vacation lodge in the remote town of North Hudson, NY, feel their woodsy getaway is plagued by negative spirits.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Boy Pushed Me
programme.desc: Bruce and Danielle are terrified by an EVP recorded in their Indiana home stating "Kill them." Even more chilling, their toddler son survived a fall out of a window only to tell his parents, "Boy pushed me."

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Knickerbocker
programme.desc: PRS checks into the Knickerbocker Hotel in Linesville, Pennsylvania where the owners are reporting strange noises and the appearance of phantom children in some of the rooms.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Ladder
programme.desc: A large family in Shrewsbury, MA, has been living with a spirit for the last 40 years. To most of the siblings, the entity is menacing and evil, but Sandy seems to have a different connection.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fire
programme.desc: Christina has been experiencing paranormal activity ever since her father and step-mother were murdered near Columbus, OH last year. PRS and psychic/medium?Chip Coffey delve into a open murder case and wind up exposing a family divide.

programme.title: Paranormal State: I Am Six
programme.desc: Laura has felt oppressed by a violent spirit ever since she heard a chilling EVP in the fall of 2007. The 26-year-old claims she's been beaten, choked, even forcibly submerged.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: One Fresh Batch of Lemonade - Part 2
programme.desc: Jonathan enlists the aid of a gymnast to rehabilitate Deke. Meanwhile, Deke's parents have been deeply affected by the accident.
programme.sub-title: One Fresh Batch of Lemonade - Part 2

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Divine Madness
programme.desc: A construction company tycoon now believes he's King Arthur, and his estranged son determines to have him declared incompetent. Can Jonathan work a reconciliation?

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Catch A Falling Star
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark have been hired to look after the kids of a movie star who never has time to spend with his family.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Help Wanted: Angel
programme.desc: An elderly scriptwriter needs someone to bankroll his movie. Meanwhile, Mark has fallen in love with an attractive woman, but Jonathan receives news about her from higher up.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Dust Child
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark must help an Amerasian girl facing racial prejudice when she goes to live with her father's family in the United States.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Hotel Of Dreams
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark are bellhops at a hotel that has been given to an aimless young man by his father. They must deal with an unkind boss, an obnoxious kid and a difficult guest.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Another Song For Christmas
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark try to help a heartless used car salesman reconsider his actions on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger UK: Nerys McGarry (Revisit)
programme.desc: Nerys dropped from a size 32 to size 12 after gastric band surgery but that dramatic weight loss took it's toll on her body and confidence. At 36 she had the sagging, wrinkling skin of someone much older. A year on does Nerys still have the youthful body?

programme.title: 10 Years Younger USA: 24-Hour Makeover
programme.desc: Crystal, a yoga instructor who gets mistaken for her mom's sister, has been chosen for a special makeover. The experts try to trim 10 years from her appearance in 24 hours.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger UK: Jayne English
programme.desc: Can Nicky Hambleton-Jones and her illustrious team of experts turn back time for 41-year-old Jayne English who went from a size 22 to a size 10 in just 18 months?

programme.title: 10 Years Younger UK: Ruth Howard
programme.desc: Bikinis are off the menu for Ruth who has gone from a size 24 to a size 10 after having weight loss surgery. However, losing 9 stone has left her with another set of problems, pounds and pounds of loose skin that hang off her, ageing her beyond her years.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger UK: Jeanette Quinn
programme.desc: Jeanette Quinn has paid the price for a party animal life. Years of party vices left this 39-year-old mum looking 50, according to bargain hunters at an antique fair. Can the team roll back the years?

programme.title: 10 Years Younger UK: Bernie Sharp "One Year On"
programme.desc: Last year, 45 year old prison worker Bernie Sharp was looking 51 – or so said one hundred straight-talking strangers on a street in Manchester. One year on, we retrace the rollercoaster journey to a brand new Bernie.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger New Zealand: Meg Carey
programme.desc: They say the café lifestyle is for hip young swingers – but it's not doing café owner Meg Carey any favours. The cakes and the coffees have taken their toll, so it's up to the 10 years team to knock off 10 years.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger USA: Renewing Her Vows
programme.desc: Mollie wants to renew her wedding vows on the day of her thirtieth anniversary. However, she desperately wants to improve her appearance so she can shine at the altar. Can we turn back the clock by making her look TEN YEARS YOUNGER?

programme.title: 10 Years Younger USA: Hair Today, Gone Tomorrow
programme.desc: Kim is a suburban wife and mother that never shook off the hippie-look of her youth. Now she longs for a more polished and sophisticated image than her long braid and wire-rimmed glasses.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger USA: Runaway Ready
programme.desc: Joslyn modeled in college, and was a woman who always took care of the way she looked. After becoming a mother, the years of neglect have caught up to her. Will our experts be able to make Joslyn runway ready?

programme.title: 10 Years Younger USA: Healing The Scars
programme.desc: Barbara provides in-home care for her mother which, coupled with her low self-esteem, has rendered her incapable of leading a normal life. To make matters worse, her appearance is severely lacking in several areas, compounding her insecurities.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger USA: Getting Back on the Catwalk
programme.desc: Stacey is a former model whose appearance has gone downhill because of the demands of caring for both her new baby and her ill mother. She's eager to get back on the catwalk and our team of experts will do a head to toe transformation.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 7
programme.desc: Alice and Danny are delighted when the Animal Hospital is given responsibility for the rescue and conservation of animals in the region – it's a big achievement after all their hard work.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 8
programme.desc: Danny and Alice are concerned about a missing male giraffe but Du Plessis is confident he can find him. He's as good as his word but they're upset to discover Mara lions have killed the giraffe.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 9
programme.desc: The family frantically dig for Charlotte in the rubble, hoping that somehow she has survived. Rowan arrives and takes charge of the situation, directing them to be more methodical in their rescue efforts.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 10
programme.desc: Danny and Alice are enjoying being together but agree to keep their relationship under wraps for the moment. However, they're unaware Georgina has heard their every word!

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 1
programme.desc: Danny and Alice's project to re-habilitate a group of circus elephants has been a huge success but now they have too many elephants on Leopard's Den, so they urgently need to move the circus herd to the National Park.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 2
programme.desc: Leopard's Den is helping to build a new school in the township but when Danny hurts his back he begins to have a crisis about his age. Danny and Alice are surprised when Vanessa comes to them for advice.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 3
programme.desc: Mara is hosting a beauty pageant and Rowan realises he needs all the publicity he can get. He buys a tiger from a zoo and convinces Alice he plans to rehabilitate it. Alice is enjoying working with her brother and even defends him to Danny.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 4
programme.desc: Danny and Alice have been preparing a cheetah for release in the wild but for some reason Danny's mind isn't on the job. He's been pre-occupied because he plans to buy a ring and propose to Alice!

programme.title: House of Tiny Tearaways: Episode 22
programme.desc: The Wilson's spend the day at a mini beastie hunt, playing in mud and getting messy. The dummy fairy comes to take Alyssa Walton's dummy away, as her sleep problem almost disappears, and the twin's show Lisa Bailey that there is still work to be done.

programme.title: House of Tiny Tearaways: Episode 23
programme.desc: It's the day before the families are due leave the House of Tiny Tearaways, but will they be able to achieve everything they were hoping to during their stay? The Bailey's have made great improvements during their stay at the house.

programme.title: House of Tiny Tearaways: Episode 24
programme.desc: After confronting past issues and being more assertive parents, with the help of Dr Tanya Byron, the Wilson's, Bailey's and Walton's have shown some remarkable improvements with their children's sleeping, eating and behaviour problems.

programme.title: House of Tiny Tearaways: Episode 25
programme.desc: It's the start of the penultimate week at the House of Tiny Tearaways. The Macleods are the first to arrive. Paula Macleod is finding it difficult to cope with 6 year old challenging behaviour.

programme.title: House of Tiny Tearaways: Episode 26
programme.desc: Tanya introduces a petting zoo to the Fallon family in the garden. Using a common relaxation exercise Dr. Tanya Byron taught her, Emma Fallon manages to control her anxieties and even touch a millipede and stroke a rabbit.

programme.title: House of Tiny Tearaways: Episode 27
programme.desc: The Scott's spend the day at a restaurant and a music shop, which is not as successful as Bridget hopes, but Erin shows some improvement as she drinks from her own beaker and tries a different porridge.

programme.title: Top Ten Show: The Rarest Automobiles
programme.desc: Most manufacturers sell their models in other countries. The production figures, therefore, easily rise into the hundreds of thousands.

programme.title: Top Ten Show: The Best Sport Versions of Small Cars
programme.desc: Almost every compact car is now available in a sporty version. And funnily enough the little racers usually have more power under the bonnet than you might think.
programme.sub-title: The Best Sport Versions of Small Cars

programme.title: Motorheads: Ferruccio Lamborghini
programme.desc: Portrait of Ferruccio Lamborghini, who originally built tractors, but then moved on to found one of the most famous sports car factories in the world.

programme.title: Motorheads: Ferry Porsche
programme.desc: Portrait of Ferdinand ‘Ferry’ Porsche, the father of the Porsche 911. He started his automobile legacy when he built the Porsche 935 after World War II.

programme.title: Motorheads: Walther Roehrl
programme.desc: Portrait of Walter Röhrl, one of the most famous rally drivers in the world. In this interview he talks about his life, his cars and the manufacturers he raced for.

programme.title: Motorheads: Hans-Joachim Stuck
programme.desc: Portrait of Hans-Joachim Stuck, one of the best race drivers in Germany. He stopped racing after participating in the 2011 24 Hours of Nürburgring.

programme.title: Motorheads: Stephane Peterhansel
programme.desc: Portrait of Stephane Peterhansel, who is a famous rally driver from France and nine-time winner of the Dakar Rallye.

programme.title: Motorheads: Alois Ruf
programme.desc: Portrait of Alois Ruf, who is the founder and owner of the small, but well-known sports car factory ‘Ruf Automobile’ in Germany.

programme.title: Motorheads: Hans Herrmann
programme.desc: Portrait of Hans Herrmann, who was famous Formula 1- and sports car driver in 1950 to 1970. He also won the 24 Hours of Le Mans.

programme.title: Motorheads: Sabine Schmitz
programme.desc: Portrait of Sabine Schmitz, a very successful race driver from Germany and the so-called "Queen of the Nordschleife".

programme.title: Motorheads: Prince Leopold von Bayern
programme.desc: Portrait of Prince Leopold von Bayern, who is a famous race driver from Germany. The Bavarian prince competed in races till 1998 and is now a brand ambassador for BMW.

programme.title: Motorheads: Henry Ford
programme.desc: Portrait of Henry Ford, a man who wanted to improve the world and became a pioneer in the automobile industry by introducing the Model T.

programme.title: 4x4: Wildly through the desert
programme.desc: In 2010, BMW and the German racing team X-Raid decided to transform a Mini Countryman into an offroad-vehicle and participate in the world-famous Dakar Rally. Also: the Mercedes G63 AMG 6x6, a most exclusive, over-the-top 6-wheel off-road monster...

programme.title: 4x4: Trendy City - SUVs
programme.desc: City-SUVs are the latest trend in the automotive world. They aren't necessarily made for offroad terrain but attract customers through their modern and urban design. In this episode, the Subaru XV shows its offroad skills, and the Nissan Juke is take…

programme.title: Ackley Bridge: Episode 3
programme.desc: Nasreen confesses to Missy about kissing her science teacher, Lila, and Nasreen's father returns home with surprising news.

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 6
programme.desc: With Nicola's affair with David out in the open, the Perrin's clash at their parents wedding. Back at Groomtech, Reggie needs to come up with a plan to scupper the chairman's plans to sell the company. Or should he just disappear again?

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 1
programme.desc: Reggie Perrin is feeling frustrated and alienated after ten years working at Groomtech. With his wife Nicola too busy for him, he becomes besotted with his new colleague Jasmine.

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 2
programme.desc: With Reggie's mother and Nicola's dad interfering in his marriage, and his inability to get on with people at work, Reggie Perrin finds himself taking a step too far with Jasmine.

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 3
programme.desc: Reggie enjoys teaching at Nicola's school, in his search to find a new focus in his life. He invites the class to spend a day at Groomtech with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 4
programme.desc: When Reggie goes to Helsinki on a business trip with Jasmine, his marriage to Nicola faces its sternest test. Meanwhile Chris has concerns that Reggie is faltering.

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 1
programme.desc: After cracking up in front of his colleagues at a sales conference, Reggie's disappeared to the beach. But what should he do next? Walk out to sea, or start a new life? Without Reggie, Groomtech is in big trouble.

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 2
programme.desc: Reggie continues his search for a fulfilling new career, but money worries are snapping at his heels. The Perrin's discover they have a new next door neighbour.

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 3
programme.desc: Reggie is the new boss at Groomtech. With the freedom to do what he wants, Reggie decides to have some fun, and introduce a new kind of product. But Nicola is feeling neglected, and is grateful for the attention of her new neighbour.

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 4
programme.desc: Whilst Reggie is busy working on his new Grot product range, David reveals his true colours to Nicola at the swimming baths. William is getting increasingly desperate in his attempts to get out of the wedding.

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 5
programme.desc: With Grot a huge success, Reggie has a difficult choice to make at Groomtech. Meanwhile, his attempts to make things up with Nicola lead to a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: When police find 24-year-old Patrick Ray with a gunshot to the temple, the scene has all the telltale signs of suicide. But Lt. Joe Kenda's instinct says otherwise.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood Sisters
programme.desc: The bullet-ridden bodies of two sisters are found in a suburban house that’s littered with mysterious clues. Joe Kenda learns that the two unassuming young mothers shared an explosive secret.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Grip
programme.desc: When a speeding truck crashes into a residential building, officers find the lifeless body of Michael Faast behind the wheel. But he didn’t die in the wreck – he was shot point-blank in the temple.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood Innocence
programme.desc: War hero Carl Taylor is beaten to death in the back of an empty semi truck, for no apparent reason. Lt Joe Kenda notices an unusual pattern in the victim’s head wounds.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Eyes Wide Shut
programme.desc: A park ranger discovers the corpse of amateur boxer Corey Edge floating in a shallow creek. Kenda learns the victim had ties to the criminal underworld, and investigates a rogue’s gallery of hustlers.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Comes Knocking
programme.desc: Neighbors are aghast when Ernestine Addison and her teen son Bobby are gunned down in cold blood. The case heats up when Kenda receives word that the killer’s murderous rampage isn’t over just yet.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Poker Face
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bella, Rocky and Madison & Catalina
programme.desc: A Chihuahua adds chaos in a previously peaceful home. A boy tries to avoid ankle attacks from his terrier. A five-legged mini Pinscher has found his perfect home, but needs to curb his biting.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bella
programme.desc: After being boarded for 5 months, American bulldog Bella evolved into a food, people, and dog aggressive pet. Owner Nate is scared he will have to euthanize her if her behavior doesn’t change.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Jake & King
programme.desc: Jake tends to mind his owner Bob but goes crazy to protect Bob’s wife Linda. At the same time, all of 10 year old Chantel’s might is hardly enough for 150 pound King to even take notice.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: various dogs and Chuy, Jack & Carmine
programme.desc: When several tenant's canines can't seem to get along, Cesar is called in to restore peace to a dog friendly complex. Cesar meets two feuding Chihuahuas and a Jack Russell Terrier.
programme.sub-title: various dogs and Chuy, Jack & Carmine

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Dexter and Nasir
programme.desc: A Chicago art teacher wants to unify her adopted Rottweiler/shepherd’s dual personality. Singer Patti LaBelle is afraid of her guard dog, an aggressive 150-pound South African boerboel.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cesar Goes to Vegas
programme.desc: Usually, Cirque du Soleil has everything under control, but several of the performer's animals are in trouble, so Cesar heads to Vegas to help out.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Harley, Annabelle and Memphis
programme.desc: Cesar gives three socially awkward pups some boundaries: a Lab in constant movement, a shrieking Australian Shepherd and Weimaraner with an eating disorder.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Tigger and Dan
programme.desc: Cesar comes in to help twins with their biting Chihuahua-Pomeranian mix. A Labrador retriever quickly takes to training to become a hunting dog but has a growing aggressive streak.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Star Chaser_The Little Merman
programme.desc: Eric is obsessed with Mermaids and has transformed himself into a real-life Merman. Vanessa is so obsessed with meeting celebrities that she spends all day searching them out.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Mouse Mania_Wigged Out
programme.desc: Janet has spent the last 30 years collecting over 5000 famous mouse memorabilia items and her collection holds the world record. Tamis has been obsessed with wearing wigs for the past 20 years.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Eats Toilet Paper/Blow Dryer
programme.desc: Lori has been sleeping with her blow dryer for 20 years, despite the risk burns or fire. Meanwhile, Kesha's family is concerned that eating half a roll of toilet paper a day is causing health issues.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Troll Takeover_Stuffing Animals
programme.desc: The Smith family has a collection of 213 stuffed and mounted animals throughout their home. Michelle’s obsession with trolls threatens her relationship with her family.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Mannequin Invasion_Carrot Queen
programme.desc: Chad Michael is a mannequin fanatic. His collection of over 300 mannequins has taken over every room of his house. Zizi has 35 carrot tattoos and she’s decorated every room with a carrot theme.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Dating My Car/ Baby Powder Addict
programme.desc: Nathaniel has been in a relationship with his car for nearly five years, taking it out on dates, buying it gifts, and even getting intimate with it. Jaye has been addicted to snorting baby powder.
programme.sub-title: Dating My Car/ Baby Powder Addict

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Eats Dirt/Extreme Toenails
programme.desc: Kristie has eaten dirt every day for the last 30 years, consuming more than five tons since her addiction began. Meanwhile, Ayanna is addicted to growing her toenails.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: My Crazy Obsession Christmas Spcl 1
programme.desc: My Crazy Obsession: Christmas Collection takes you inside the lives of extreme collectors who have taken holiday decorating to the max. For these obsessed collectors, it's Christmas year round.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Raggedy Ann_A Rat's Tale
programme.desc: Chantal’s 19 pet rats are more than just pets; she considers them her children. Robyn loves to share her obsession with Raggedy Ann and she tries to convert new Raggedy believers.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Casting / Psychics
programme.desc: Profiled are Kevin, who constantly covers his body in plaster casts even though he is not injured, and Melissa who is incapable of making a decision without a consulting a psychic.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Grown-Up Baby
programme.desc: Stanley, 31, has been obsessed with being an adult baby for the past 18 years. Every day he wears footie pajamas, eats baby food, wears a diaper and sleeps in a crib.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Spin Cycle_Newborn Dolls
programme.desc: Fred and Robert have a rare collection of vintage washing machines. They’ve over $40,000 to compile this one-of-a-kind collection. Lynn has created over 1,800 life-like vinyl newborn dolls.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Ventriloquist/Cat Lady
programme.desc: April's addiction to her puppets has gotten so strong she can't go anywhere without them. Debbie is severely allergic to cats, but has over twenty of them, leaving her in isolation.

programme.title: Buying Alaska: Fish Out Of Water
programme.desc: Grant and Khrissy just got engaged. He’s all-Alaskan but she’s a fish out of water from the Deep South. The couple wants to buy a house that’s a mix of the Alaskan bush and her Alabama roots.

programme.title: Buying Alaska: Outhouse Life
programme.desc: Sean and Charlotte want a home in Fairbanks, Alaska, that won’t cost them a penny in utility bills. So they’re going off-the-grid. And that means one thing… there’ll be no bathrooms.

programme.title: Buying Alaska: Hangar Homes
programme.desc: Born and bred Alaskans Andy and Nicole grew up in a town so remote, their family vehicles were airplanes! Now that they’re looking for a new home, they need an airplane hangar and a runway.

programme.title: Buying Alaska: Remote Coves
programme.desc: Charlie and Toni are outdoor adventure junkies who want a home in Alaska that’s so remote they can catch their next meal from the ocean right off their front porch.

programme.title: Buying Alaska: Homer Bound
programme.desc: Nathan and Lindsay are brand new to Alaska. They want a house similar to where Nathan’s pioneer grandfather lived, in the bayside town of Homer, surrounded by the great outdoors.

programme.title: Buying Alaska: Life On A Mountain
programme.desc: Russ and Dana search for a home in the town of Girdwood, Alaska, at the base of towering Mount Alyeska. The views are spectacular, but the danger of an avalanches is real.

programme.title: Buying Alaska: Guys Getaway
programme.desc: David Parks and Chris Erickson are best friends, and professional handymen. They want to buy a weekend getaway house in the wilds of Alaska, but they don’t want to spend a lot of money.

programme.title: Buying Alaska: Juneau Waterfront
programme.desc: Chris and Heidi are marine adventurers who want Alaska’s marine wildlife right out their front door. They want to buy a home on the coveted waterfront of the oceanside city of Juneau.

programme.title: Buying Alaska: Tiny Homes, Big Mountain
programme.desc: Pete and Martha have lived and worked in some of the wildest locations in the U.S. In Alaska they want an isolated home with views of the tallest peak in North America - Mount McKinley.

programme.title: Buying Alaska: Dollars Or Drains
programme.desc: Texas native Colby wants an affordable home, but he’s in for a shock because, in Alaska, that means a dry cabin – with no running water. He doesn’t know anything about life without plumbing.

programme.title: Buying Alaska: Dangerous Trails
programme.desc: Brandon and Hanna want a home on an isolated lake far into the Alaskan wild, where there’s no way in but off-roading through trails of mud or landing on water.

programme.title: Buying Alaska: No Roads In
programme.desc: Dave and Wendy want a remote cabin where they can escape to the Alaskan frontier way of life, places so hidden that the only way there is by off-road vehicle and no outhouse is safe from hungry bears.

programme.title: Buying Alaska: Jaws, Claws & Beaver Fever
programme.desc: Shane and Erica want a home in the Alaskan wild, where it’s so remote, the only way in is by a monster 8-wheeler. Homeowners beware! Bears attack the properties and beavers infect the drinking water.

programme.title: Buying Bayou: Hot Tubs and Gators
programme.desc: Duck, Lathan, & Flip are tired of traveling each weekend to their favorite place to enjoy bayou living. They’re willing to do anything to buy a home if they can hunt gators right out their back door.

programme.title: Baywatch: The Drowning Pool
programme.desc: A wealthy older man drowns under suspicious circumstances in front of Jill Riley's tower. Jill endures the pain of losing her first victim, becoming obsessed with unraveling whether his death was an accidental drowning or murder.

programme.title: Baywatch: Rookie School
programme.desc: While housesitting for Craig and Gina, Eddie takes in a runaway whose life is threatened by her mobster boyfriend. Meanwhile, Trevor enters Baywatch rookie school to become a certified LA County lifeguard.

programme.title: Baywatch: Cruise Ship
programme.desc: Eddie warns Shauni that her new boyfriend Andrew is not a good guy. She ignores Eddie until Andrew gives her a black eye. Meanwhile, Craig and Mitch must stop an out of control party boat before it crashes into the crowded Santa Monica pier.

programme.title: Baywatch: Cretin of the Shallows
programme.desc: Several people are murdered at the beach by a mysterious man in ghoulish make-up and Eddie is knocked unconscious by what he describes as a "cretin." Eddie's report is met with skepticism until the identity of the killer is dramatically revealed.

programme.title: Baywatch: Shelter Me
programme.desc: During a tropical storm, Eddie and Shauni take refuge in the Pomeroy's loft, turning a cold night into the start of a hot romance. In the downpour, two escaped convicts shoot Garner, then break into Baywatch headquarters and take everyone hostage.

programme.title: Baywatch: The Reunion
programme.desc: Craig gets jealous when Mitch reunites with his and Craig’s old flame. Meanwhile, Eddie buys a classic Mustang for cheap, only to get arrested for possession of a stolen car.

programme.title: Baywatch: Armored Car
programme.desc: Jill teams up with Trevor to win a beach volleyball tournament, but all she really wants is to beat her former lover's team. Eddie and Shauni team up to rescue a young girl trapped in an armored car that topples off the pier into the ocean.

programme.title: Baywatch: Home Cort
programme.desc: Mitch gets a surprise visit from his old, mischievous Navy S.E.A.L. buddy and ex-Baywatch lifeguard, John Cort, adding serious problems in their already complicated relationship. And Shauni and Jill fight a battle of the sexes against a shady vendor.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Connie, Positive I.D., Trucker, Cook Out, The New House.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 5
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Needle Point, Toy to the Rescue, Mystery Lock, The House on Baker Street, The Train.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 8
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Creepy Comics, Louie the Dip, The Wailing, The Landlady, Curse.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 3
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Find, The Golden Cue, The FBI Story, The Gravedigger's Nemesis, Last Rites.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 6
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Dorm, The Child Artist, The Weatherman, Sit-Down Comedian, Room 245.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 3
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Out of Service, When I Was Big, The Greedy Investor, Seven Hours of Bad Luck, The Secret of the Coins.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Witness to Murder, Roulette Wheel, The Phrenologist's Head, The Bridge, The Cigar Box.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8157
programme.desc: Flo and Shauna sneak into Brooke’s cabin to explain their side of the story to Hope. Shauna goes up against Brooke, Katie and Donna while Hope lashes out at Flo.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8158
programme.desc: First Hope and then Ridge see to it that Flo receives her just deserts for kidnapping baby Beth. Wyatt feels conflicted in regards to his feelings for Flo and his loyalty to his family.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8159
programme.desc: Ridge receives an unsettling visit from Det. Sanchez, looking for Thomas, about the death of Emma. Justin steps in to help Hope annul her marriage and undo Phoebe’s adoption.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8160
programme.desc: Thomas’s rage intensifies when he receives the news that Hope is having their marriage annulled. Unsure of where he is hiding, Brooke and Liam worry that Thomas will go to any length to reunite with Hope.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8161
programme.desc: Brooke comforts Ridge when he admits what he feels his biggest failure in life has been. Having convinced Amelia to bring Douglas to him, Thomas hurls angry accusations at his son.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8162
programme.desc: Hope is in danger when Thomas unexpectedly arrives at the cliff house in search of her. Separately, Ridge and Brooke race against time to get to Hope before Thomas does.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8163
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes as Brooke rushes judgment in an attempt to save Hope from Thomas. Dollar Bill vows to Wyatt and Justin that Flo will pay for her actions against Hope and Liam.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8164
programme.desc: Ridge and Brooke’s marriage hangs in the balance after he accuses her of an unspeakable crime. Liam attempts to convince Hope that Thomas got himself into his current predicament.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8165
programme.desc: The reality of her daughter’s situation hits hard when Shauna visits Flo in jail. Ridge expresses his disbelief towards Brooke’s explanation and Thomas’s actions.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8166
programme.desc: Shauna comes clean to Quinn while imploring her friend to help free Flo from prison. Ridge becomes furious when he happens upon Liam scorning an unconscious Thomas.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8167
programme.desc: The Forresters, Logans and Spencers struggle with whether or not Thomas will survive his injuries. Detective Sanchez hits Ridge and Brooke hard with questions about Thomas’s accident.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8168
programme.desc: Sally and Wyatt become playful after sharing a tender and unexpected kiss. Brooke worries as Thomas begins to answer Det. Sanchez’s questions about his accident.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8169
programme.desc: While Shauna visits her in jail, Flo comes to comprehend the immense impact of her actions. Brooke is in utter disbelief that Ridge doesn’t believe her story about Thomas.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8170
programme.desc: On a warpath for answers, Ridge explodes at Flo declaring that she will get what she deserves. Stunned by Brooke’s confession, Bill pays an unexpected visit to Thomas in the hospital.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8171
programme.desc: The Logan sisters band together in an effort to help Brooke in her time of trouble. Ridge is disconcerted when Det. Sanchez brings up Thomas and his involvement in the death of Emma Barber.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8172
programme.desc: Dollar Bill takes action to help Brooke find cold, hard evidence against Thomas. Ridge lambastes Thomas as his son recounts to him the series of events on the night that Emma died.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 8173
programme.desc: Steffy rages against Thomas for the harm he’s done to her, Hope, Liam, Beth and Kelly. Ridge unexpectedly finds himself holding the keys to Flo and Thomas’s futures.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Haunted U-Boat
programme.desc: During World War II a German U-boat is apparently haunted by a loud banging which only occurs when it is submerged.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Image of Death
programme.desc: An inspector is suspicious about the death of the wife of a Marquis, who, in fact, did kill her with his lover Charlotte as his accomplice.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Captain's Guest
programme.desc: A sadistic sea captain from the 19th century haunts a New England home and poisons the lives of a married couple after taking possession of the husband's mind.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Echo
programme.desc: Paul Martin is acquitted by a jury of the murder of his wife, although most people believe he did in fact kill her. To escape questioning reporters, he takes a house in the country.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Front Runner
programme.desc: Two jockeys who are good friends have a falling out when one accuses the other of foul practice during a race. Some years later, the accused jockey believes his accuser has obtained his revenge by supernatural means.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Riddle
programme.desc: On a trip through India, a married couple encounters a beggar who seems to be different from all the others they've seen--the husband is convinced that this particular beggar is trying to kill them.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Delusion
programme.desc: A man with a rare blood type is unwilling to donate his blood in order to save a girl's life, knowing that if he does he will be tormented by supernatural visions of her future.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Ordeal on Locust Street
programme.desc: A seemingly normal family is hiding a terrible secret: their son has the features of a deformed, fish-like monster.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Brainwave
programme.desc: Aboard a United States ship in Japanese waters during World War II, Captain Fielding is critically injured.

programme.title: Creature from the Haunted Sea
programme.desc: In this spoof of horror and spy thrillers, American gangster Renzo Capetto decides to kill members of his bungling crew and blame their deaths on a legendary sea creature. What he doesn't know is that the creature is actually out there!

programme.title: Castle of the Living Dead
programme.desc: A troupe of travelling players are invited by Count Drago to perform at his castle. Ignoring the warning given by a local mystic, they accept - and begin to die, horrifically, one by one!

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Party Politics
programme.desc: Margaret runs into a distant friend who asks her to have an Ann Summers-type party in her home.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Going Dutch
programme.desc: Margaret enters a contest and wins the grand prize: a cycling tour of Holland!

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: My Foot Hurts
programme.desc: Margaret gets her own local call-in radio show entitled My Foot Hurts.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Bob or Two
programme.desc: Bob buys an inexpensive painting from the neighbours at a junk sale and hangs it in his surgery to brighten things up.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Stranded in Toronto
programme.desc: When Bob and Margaret take a trip to New York, their flight is re-routed to Toronto due to a storm.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Strangers in a Strange Land
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret are mortified to discover that while they have been cooped up at Cookie and Melvin's house in Mississauga Ontario, their dogs have been left unattended by Penny, Bob's unreliable receptionist.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Margaret Gets a Job
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have made the big move to Canada.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Til Death Do Us
programme.desc: Bob gets conned into buying a cemetery plot for Margaret as a surprise 15th wedding anniversary gift.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Wedding
programme.desc: Cookie and Melvin invite Bob and Margaret to the wedding of their goddaughter, Tiffany.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Fish at the Bat
programme.desc: Bob gets cajoled into joining his office softball team.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Over-Exposed
programme.desc: Margaret accidentally picks up her neighbour's photos at the pharmacy.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Book Club
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret join a book club in the hopes of expanding their tiny social horizon.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: On Location
programme.desc: A film crew sets up shop on Bob and Margaret's street, giving them a small and unsavory taste of fame and fortune.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Cottage Country
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret get invited up to the cottage of Dr. Yoselheiffer, President of the Canadian Council of Dentists.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Driving Bob
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have put it off for too long. They need to get their Canadian drivers' licenses.

programme.title: The Nanny: Canasta Master
programme.desc: Brighton (Benjamin Salisbury) finds his niche on Fran's mother's (Renee Taylor) canasta team. Stars: Fran Drescher.

programme.title: The Nanny: The Will
programme.desc: Mr. Sheffield (Charles Shaughnessy) asks Fran (Fran Drescher) to be guardian of his children in the event of his death.

programme.title: The Nanny: The Nanny Behind the Man
programme.desc: To help Maxwell's (Charles Shaughnessy) efforts to woo a playwright (Ray Stricklyn), Fran (Fran Drescher) offers to set the man up with a feisty woman. Guest star: Roger Clinton.

programme.title: The Nanny: A Fine Friendship
programme.desc: When Fran (Fran Drescher) befriends an attractive male nanny (Christopher Rich), Mr. Sheffield (Charles Shaughnessy) reveals his possessive side.

programme.title: The Nanny: Chester Eats Lamb Chop
programme.desc: C.C.'s (Lauren Lane) dog is the main suspect when house guest Shari Lewis' (guest starring as herself) puppet Lamb Chop is missing.

programme.title: The Nanny: Close Shave
programme.desc: When Maggie's (Nicholle Tom) social life clashes with her job as a candy striper, Fran (Fran Drescher) comes to the rescue.

programme.title: The Nanny: What the Butler Sung
programme.desc: Niles (Daniel Davis) does a different kind of job for Mr. Sheffield (Charles Shaughnessy) when he sings at a backers' audition.

programme.title: The Nanny: Chatterbox
programme.desc: Maggie receives a party invitation so Fran takes her to her favorite beauty salon. Fran gets a job there for an actress who loses a Sheffield audition.

programme.title: The Nanny: What the Butler Sang
programme.desc: Maxwell hears Niles singing and asks him to sing for his backers' audition. Meanwhile, Fran clashes with her sister Nadine.

programme.title: The Nanny: A Kiss is Just a Kiss
programme.desc: Fran and Maggie (Fran Drescher, Nicholle Tom) enter a contest where the winner appears on the cover of a Billy Ray Cyrus album.
programme.sub-title: A Kiss is Just a Kiss

programme.title: The Nanny: Strange Bedfellows
programme.desc: After attending a retirement party for a friend (Tyne Daly), Fran (Fran Drescher) stumbles into bed with Maxwell (Charles Shaughnessy). With Daniel Davis.

programme.title: The Nanny: The Chatterbox
programme.desc: Maggie receives a party invitation so Fran takes her to her favorite beauty salon. Fran gets a job there for an actress who loses a Sheffield audition.

programme.title: The Nanny: Fran Gets Mugged
programme.desc: When Fran and Brighton (Fran Drescher, Benjamin Salisbury) are mugged in Central Park, the perpetrator (Alex Nevil) gets more than a purse.

programme.title: The Nanny: A Fine Family Feud
programme.desc: Fran's (Fran Drescher) exciting plans for Maggie's (Nicholle Tom) Sweet Sixteen party go awry because of family antagonisms. With Renee Taylor.

programme.title: The Nanny: Franny and the Professor
programme.desc: C.C.'s brother (Michael McKean) bets her (Lauren Lane) that he can help Fran (Fran Drescher) qualify as a "Jeopardy!" contestant.

programme.title: The Nanny: Pen Pal
programme.desc: Fran must overcome many hurdles when her pen pal (Florence Griffith-Joyner) of 25 years wants to meet her.

programme.title: Married With Children: I Who Have Nothing
programme.desc: Al tries to retrieve his game ball from a former girlfriend after he takes stock of his life and finds he has nothing.

programme.title: Married With Children: The Mystery of Skull Island
programme.desc: As Grandmaster B, Bud does his coolest best while all over a girl who takes him out to non-traditional Bundy things such as rafting and sky diving. Meanwhile, Al and Peggy invite Marcy and Jefferson over to play a new board game called "Ethical Dilemma."

programme.title: Married With Children: Just Shoe It
programme.desc: Al is asked to appear in an athletic shoe commercial. Al, being Polk High's 1966 all city running back and shoe salesman, is glad to reclaim his glory days

programme.title: Married With Children: Rites of Passage
programme.desc: It's Bud's 18th birthday, but everyone still treats him like a little boy. Does he stay at home for his birthday party with a pony and a clown or does Al have something else in mind for his "adult" son?

programme.title: Married With Children: The Egg and I
programme.desc: Steve returns to try and reclaim his estranged wife unaware that she has remarried to a younger man.

programme.title: Married With Children: Psychic Avengers
programme.desc: Al is a broken man after the Bundys can no longer afford to buy a weekly TV Guide. When Jefferson arrives at their house with a fistful of cash, Al discovers that he has been running a psychic phone scam called "Madame Zelda."

programme.title: Married With Children: My Dinner with Anthrax
programme.desc: It's Al and Peggy's 20th wedding anniversary, but Peggy only wants one thing from Al....S-E-X. Meanwhile, Kelly and Bud win the "My Dinner With Anthrax" contest which means a house party for the thrash metal band.

programme.title: Married With Children: High I.Q.
programme.desc: An invitation to join the high intelligence Alpha club, is issued to Kelly and not Bud. When they discover the real reason behind the gathering, Kelly and Bud decide to handle things with the usual Bundy charm (and violence).

programme.title: Married With Children: Teacher Pets
programme.desc: Bud's belief that his 40-year-old teacher is romantic interested in him is greeted by laughter from everyone. But another student smells the smoke and wants the fire for herself.

programme.title: Married With Children: The Goodbye Girl
programme.desc: When Kelly's modeling school closes down, she gets a new job as a greeter at the TV World theme park. When this is threatened by her low performance ratings, Kelly is moved into Commercial Land where she plays "the Verminator" who hunts down roaches.

programme.title: Married With Children: The Gas Station Show
programme.desc: When Al can't pay his bill at the gas station, he is forced to don a uniform and work at the station. He spends the day being hounded by motorists, as well as Peg and the kids.

programme.title: Married With Children: England Show - Pt 1
programme.desc: Lower Uncton, England 1653-- Seamus McBundy makes the mistake of insulting a witch who casts an evil spell upon the land, shading the town in darkness forever--as long as a male Bundy lives.

programme.title: Married With Children: England Show - Pt 2
programme.desc: The Bundys delight in their comped trip to England, spending here and there. All the while, the town of Upper Uncton conspires to kill the Bundys outside Lower Uncton, so the curse will remain and Upper Uncton can still rake in profits as a tourist town.

programme.title: Married With Children: England Show - Pt 3
programme.desc: The Bundys are cornered by both towns. Upper Uncton wants them dead so they can continue to profit as a tourist trap while Lower Uncton wants them dead so they can end the curse.

programme.title: Married With Children: Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: Al is shocked about having another kid when Peggy's relatives leave their five-year-old son Seven in the Bundy home.

programme.title: Married With Children: T-R-A-Something-Something Spells Tramp
programme.desc: Kelly has to walk through the wilderness after dumping her boyfriend in the forest. Al and Peg try to 'talk' their marriage alive, but without success. Bud dates a girl with the measles.

programme.title: Great British Bike Rides: Wales
programme.desc: George and Larry Lamb head up and down Snowdonia.

programme.title: Great British Bike Rides: The Peak District
programme.desc: The Lambs race through Britain's first ever National Park.

programme.title: Walking Britain's Lost Railways: Scotland
programme.desc: In Scotland, Rob Bell follows the Elgin to Portsoy line.

programme.title: Walking Britain's Lost Railways: Sheffield
programme.desc: Rob Bell follows the line over the bleak Pennines.

programme.title: Walking Britain's Lost Railways: Dartmoor
programme.desc: The Plymouth-Exeter line was built to transport rice pudding.

programme.title: Walking Britain's Lost Railways: Lake District
programme.desc: This lost line sustained the Lakes region with hard industry.

programme.title: Walking Britain's Lost Railways: Wales
programme.desc: Rob Bell explores the lost line from Ruabon to Barmouth.

programme.title: Walking Britain's Lost Railways: Derbyshire
programme.desc: A trip along the former London to Manchester express route.

programme.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald: India, Part 2
programme.desc: On board a luxurious cruise ship on the Ganges Jane learns how to wear a sari, and rustle up a spicy Bengal curry. In the former French colonial town of Chandannagar Jane meets a protegee of Mother Theresa.

programme.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald: Great Lakes
programme.desc: Jane uncovers a little-known cruise route in the Great Lakes of America and Canada.

programme.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald: Mediterranean Riviera
programme.desc: Jane takes in Rome, Monaco and Barcelona along the Riviera.

programme.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald: The Balkans
programme.desc: Jane rides the train of emperors and visits Dracula's castle.

programme.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald: The Adriatic Sea
programme.desc: From historic Dubrovnik, via Venice to the spectacular Split.

programme.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald: The Caribbean, Part 1
programme.desc: The singer returns to embark on more voyages around the world, beginning with the first of two programmes charting a trip to the Caribbean aboard a new luxury liner.

programme.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald: The Caribbean, Part 2
programme.desc: Jane heads to Grand Cayman, the playground for the rich.

programme.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald: Cruising at Christmas with Jane McDonald
programme.desc: Jane boards the Norwegian institution, Coastal Express.
programme.sub-title: Cruising at Christmas with Jane McDonald

programme.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald: Down Under: Episode 1
programme.desc: The singer and host explores the west coast of Australia.
