programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: Ribs Ribs and More Ribs
programme.desc: Among Georgia Champion Robby Royal of Rescue Smokers, Texas Champion Junior Urias of Up in Smoke and Wild Card Champion John Coon of House of Q, who will emerge victorious to continue on to win the title of BBQ Pitmasters Grand Champion?

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: Best in Beef
programme.desc: Regional Champions Joe Pearce, Ken Wood and Carl Lewis are grilling to stay alive in this thrilling BBQ Pitmasters Semi Final round. They all know that only one will survive and have a chance to be crowned Kingsford BBQ Pitmasters Grand Champion.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: Winner Takes All
programme.desc: Semi Final Champions Robby Royal of Rescue Smokers and Joe Pearce of Squeal Like A Pig BBQ go head to head in the Finale to decide once and for all who is the Kingsford BBQ Pitmasters Grand Champion and winner of the $50,000 grand prize.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: Father and Son
programme.desc: The one-hour special, BBQ PITMASTERS: FATHER VS. SON features the King of 'Cue as he hits the road with the crowned prince by his side.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: Revenge Ham
programme.desc: Three of the toughest Pitmasters from previous seasons are back and in this first round battle, fresh ham and cowboy steak are on the menu. Who will come out on top?

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: Brisket Redemption'
programme.desc: Lee Ann Whippen is looking to avenge her loss in the Season Two finale to Shad Kirton. Meanwhile, the chicken king, Jamie Geer just might play spoiler. Is Shad on his way to another Grand Championship? Or will he have to cancel the victory parade?

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: Smoker Envy
programme.desc: Three All-Stars are back and competing against each other for the first time. For this round Brisket and Venison tenderloin are for the cooking.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: Ribs Rematch
programme.desc: $50,000 and the coveted title of Kingsford BBQ Pitmasters All-Star Grand Champion are on the line. Reigning Grand Champion Robby Royal is looking for another victory over Junior Urias and John Coon.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder in Room 205
programme.desc: A young woman's journey to a new life comes to a savage end in a roadside motel.

programme.title: On the Case: Betrayal and Regret
programme.desc: After a teenage girl is found murdered in an isolated cemetery, police must untangle a dark mystery in order to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: On the Case: A Ray of Darkness
programme.desc: Police must connect two vicious murders in order to bring a single killer to justice.

programme.title: On the Case: Unmistakable Truth
programme.desc: A family of three is murdered and investigators must take on one of their own in order to find justice.

programme.title: On the Case: Trapped by Lies
programme.desc: Before police can catch a depraved killer of a 15 year old girl, they must first unravel a puzzling series of lies.

programme.title: On the Case: Profile of a Killer
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman is found murdered in the basement of her brand new home, Police are forced to use cutting edge techniques to solve a terrifying mystery.

programme.title: On the Case: Final Words
programme.desc: A devoted mother returns home from work and finds her 17-year-old daughter has been murdered. Was her killer the mysterious boyfriend she had written about in her journal?

programme.title: On the Case: A Knock on the Door
programme.desc: A beautiful young mother is found murdered in the bedroom of her home. The only witness was her five year old son. Would he be able to help police solve the crime?

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Bread Truck
programme.desc: X and the guys at G.A.S. create a skate van from an old bread truck. They even install the loudest sound system you've ever seen!

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Benz
programme.desc: Pimp Master of Ceremonies Xzibit turns tired old hatchbacks into fully loaded cruisin' machines. In this episode, X and the guys bling out a Mercedes Benz with a 'crunk trunk'!

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Vegas Van
programme.desc: Xzibit turns tired old cars into fully loaded cruisin' machines. In this episode, X and the guys at G.A.S. roll the dice on a Vegas themed van that is down on its luck.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Mom's Minivan
programme.desc: Pimp Master of Ceremonies Xzibit turns tired old hatchbacks into fully loaded cruisin' machines. X and the guys take a worn out Mama's Minivan and make it fit for a 'Glamour Girl'.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 508 Maxima
programme.desc: X and the guys create a fantasy car! Complete with reverse gull wing doors, a cotton candy machine, and even a robotic arm!

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Ford
programme.desc: X and the G.A.S. crew surprise the owner of a Ford Festiva with a big pimpin' a nitrous system, a racing body kit, a 'tower of power' and a telescoping sound and video system!

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Fantastic Four
programme.desc: Chamillionaire fills in for X and finds a comic book lover who's obsessed by the Fantastic Four, so the guys at G.A.S. turn this fan's beat down ride into a chromed out 'Silver Surfer'

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Ford Econoline/Doggie Van
programme.desc: X finds a mobile doggie grooming company owner with one mangy mutt of a car. G.A.S. pimp out the car with a top-of-the-line doggie washing station, plasma TVs, and a hydraulics door!

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Jeep Grand Wagoneer
programme.desc: X pimps a Jeep owned by a contractor who's always on the go. The guys at G.A.S. give it a 'lowrider' style paint job and airbags, and add the ultimate contractors tool box to the back!

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Pontiac
programme.desc: X and the guys take in a Pontiac Sunbird. This beat down convertible's getting a new lease on life as a 'Tiki-mobile', complete with Tiki graphics, binoculars and an Italian ice machine!

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Crown Victoria Station Wagon
programme.desc: X surprises an nurse by turning her 1984 Ford Crown Victoria station wagon into a hot-rod style ambulance, with a CATscan-style sound system and a video monitor shaped like a defibrillator!

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Chevy Cavalier
programme.desc: X and the guys turn a Chevy Cavalier into a one of a kind sparkly 'root-beer' painted creation - complete with a gumball machine, a scrapbooking station and virtual reality gaming seats!

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Subaru Impreza
programme.desc: Xzibit and the crew take aim at a 1996 Subaru Impreza. They turn the owner's ride into a 'rally car' with off-road tires, authentic rally graphics and a big load of paintball gear!

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Cadillac Hearse
programme.desc: X surprises the owner of a Cadillac hearse with a 'macabre mobile' complete with a velvet interior, a 42 inch monitor, and a motorized coffin that contains a barbeque grill and refrigerator!

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Daihatsu HiJet
programme.desc: Xzibit shows you how to transform your tired old car into a fully loaded cruisin' machine. Today, Wyatt gets his 1988 Daihatsu Hi-Jet pimped with a mini-fridge, guitar amp and DVD player.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Cadillac Sedan DeVille 1978
programme.desc: Xzibit shows you how to transform your tired old hatchback into a fully loaded cruisin' machine. Today, Nile gets her 1978 Cadillac Sedan DeVille pimped with heart-shaped break lights.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme 1986
programme.desc: Xzibit shows you how to transform your tired old hatchback into a fully loaded cruisin' machine. Today, Logan gets his Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme pimped with a karaoke machine in the trunk.

programme.title: Pacific Blue: No Man's Land
programme.desc: A gang of neo-Nazi surfers cause trouble for the squad when their attacks on beachgoers lead to violent confrontations involving T.C. (Jim Davidson) and Victor.

programme.title: Pacific Blue: Over the Edge
programme.desc: After discovering an old friend has died in a suspicious skydiving accident, T.C. infiltrates a group of thrill seekers that he believes are behind the "accident."

programme.title: Pacific Blue: Out of the Past
programme.desc: When a dead woman's body turns up on the beach with an origami angel on her chest, Lt. Palermo realizes that the serial killer who left him with a permanent leg injury has returned to the area.

programme.title: Pacific Blue: Takedown
programme.desc: T.C. finds himself face to face with an armed gang member on the roof of a liquor store. After being ordered to shoot T.C., the young gunman has cold feet and flees.

programme.title: Pacific Blue: Heatwave
programme.desc: A scorching heatwave has descended on the beach and is making everyone crazy. T.C. and Chris are called in when a stalker begins killing to attract a radio sex therapist's attention.

programme.title: Pacific Blue: Burnout
programme.desc: A body builder working at Sheila's restaurant is hooked on steroids and in debt to her dealer, another body builder who is out of control due to frequent use of his own product.

programme.title: Pacific Blue: Moving Target
programme.desc: Things heat up for T.C. when a woman from his past witnesses a crime and he's assigned to be her bodyguard. Meanwhile, Victor faces down his demons in the boxing ring.

programme.title: Pacific Blue: Captive Audience
programme.desc: When T.C., Cory and a pregnant woman are held hostage by a team of violent thieves, Palermo tries to negotiate their release.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Scorched Earth
programme.desc: Bombings begin at embassies and Liam believes they may reignite the SI (Sino-Indian) War, which ended with an armistice several years before. An old intelligence agency friend of Renee's has interesting holographic technology.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Irish Crown Affair
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel head to Dublin, Ireland in search of the missing crown of the last King of Ireland.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: A Vanishing Art
programme.desc: Accompanying Max the magician, Sydney and Nigel journey to Atlantic City, New Jersey in search of Hungary's lost and allegedly cursed Royal Scepter.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Love Letter
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel go to France to look for the lost wedding vows of Josephine Pontoise and Guy de Bourdin, which would prove their heir is the rightful owner of St. Agnes Sur-Loire.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: A Good Year
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel travel to France to find the lost stones from Marie Antoinette's Crown.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Nothing But the Truth
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are reunited with Stewie Harper in the search for the Chalice of Truth in France.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel go to Paris, France after the Sword of Jacques de Molay, Grand Master of the Knights Templar. Rival relic hunter Rita Rosellini is also after the sword.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Possessed
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are in Brussels, Belgium in search of the sacred sundial of Zeus in order to stop the Vampires.

programme.title: Iron Chef: Battle Corn
programme.desc: The bad boy of French cuisine, Keiji Nakazawa, challenges Iron Chef Michiba in the battle of corn.

programme.title: Iron Chef: Battle Potatoes
programme.desc: Spuds will fly when Challenger Katsuyo Kobayashi, a Japanese cooking show host, takes on Iron Chef Chen.

programme.title: Iron Chef: Battle Mushroom
programme.desc: Heavyweight challenger Hideki Osako seeks a battle of mushroom with Iron Chef Chen.

programme.title: Iron Chef: Battle Bell Pepper
programme.desc: German-born French cuisine specialist Artur Rutter challenges Iron Chef Michiba in the battle of bell pepper.

programme.title: Iron Chef: Battle Saury (Fish)
programme.desc: Nouvelle French chef Tsutomu Hiroi battles against new wave Japanese Iron Chef Michiba.

programme.title: Iron Chef: Battle Yam
programme.desc: Soutetsu Fujii, the first Buddhist priest to appear at Kitchen Stadium, takes on Iron Chef Sakai in the battle of yam.

programme.title: Iron Chef: France Special: Part 1
programme.desc: Chairman Takeshi Kaga travels to battle the great French chefs. Witness as Iron Chef Sakai and Iron Chef Nakamura battle to defend the honor of Iron Chefs and the Gourmet Academy.

programme.title: Iron Chef: France Special: Part 2
programme.desc: Chairman Takeshi Kaga travels to battle the great French chefs. Witness as Iron Chef Sakai and Iron Chef Nakamura battle to defend the honor of Iron Chefs and the Gourmet Academy.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: Sonic Past Cool
programme.desc: Tails brings a new friend home to Knothole a baby TerraPod who has strayed from the herd that is currently migrating.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: Heads or Tails
programme.desc: Sonic reluctantly takes Tails with him to the Big City to find some cotter pins for the Freedom Fighters catapults. While in the City, Sonic is nearly eaten alive by his old dog Muttski, now a robotisized guard dog in the Junk Heaps.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: Sonic Conversation
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters, with new addition, Dulcy, develop a DeRobotisizer and try it out on Bunnie.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: Game Guy
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters run into a Swashbuckler, named Ari, battling SwatBots. Sonic diverts them, allowing Ari to escape.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: No Brainer
programme.desc: Sonic attempts a solo rescue to prevent prisoners from being robotisized and is hit by a Memory Scrambler that erases shortterm memory.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: Blast to the Part I
programme.desc: After a disastrous failed mission, Sonic laments that they can't go back and prevent Robotnik's takeover.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: Blast to the Part II
programme.desc: In Part II, Sonic and Sally steal the Robotisizer plans, stop the Destroyer from polluting the Great Forest and save Little Sonic,Sally and Dulcy's mother, Sabina, but are unable to prevent Robotnik from robotisizing Uncle Chuck.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: Fed up with Antonie//Ghost-Busted
programme.desc: Antoine decides to study martial arts but after he wrecks most of Knothole, Sonic sends him off to practice in the woods, where he runs into a scurvy band of Road Warriortypes, called the Nasty Hyenas.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: Dulcy
programme.desc: After Dulcy exhibits strange behavior, Sally discovers she's going through a rites of passage stage of her adolescence. In Dragon tradition, she is drawn to Dragon Lair, a migratory nesting ground, through trancelike visits from her mother.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: The Void
programme.desc: After Sonic is almost sucked inside the Void, he finds a huge Ring which Sally believes is an ancient relic but it turns out to be trick of the Sorcerer, Nagus.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: The Odd Couple//Ro-Becca
programme.desc: When a blizzard hits Knothole causing Dulcy to demolish a few huts during a landing, Sonic is forced to bunk with Antoine. It is truly a marriage of opposites, with Antoine constantly picking up after Sonic.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: Cry of the Wolf
programme.desc: On a mission to contact the first Freedom Fighters on the King's List, Sonic and the others are forced to travel through a tunnel which carries a curse against all intruders.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: Drood Henge
programme.desc: When Uncle Chuck's bug reveals Robotnik's search for the legendary Deep Power Stones, he informs Sally, who tries to retrieve data regarding the Royal Family Secret.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: Spyhog
programme.desc: After Antoine saves Sally's life during a raid, Sonic can't stand his bragging and zips in to see Uncle Chuck, who finds out his bug in Robotnik's HQ is malfunctioning.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: The Doomsday Project
programme.desc: When a Pod lands in Knothole, Sonic and Sally realize the Doomsday Machine is already in operation. The Freedom Fighter groups break into the Doomsday Machine, only to find Robotnik let them in.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Bird! The Bird!
programme.desc: While venturing in a snowy world, Toad is kidnapped by a nearsighted Birdo who is convinced that he is her missing baby.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The London Nail Bombings
programme.desc: London was brought to a standstill in April 1999 when 23-year-old political extremist David Copeland caused terror with a bombing campaign.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Murder Of Jill Dando
programme.desc: Documentary examining the unsolved murder of British TV presenter and newsreader Jill Dando, who was shot outside her house in Fulham, London, in 1999.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Dunblane Massacre
programme.desc: In an emotional tribute, witnesses and victims' relatives look back on the tragic murder of 16 children and a teacher at Dunblane Primary School in Scotland, 15 years ago.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Jeremy Bamber
programme.desc: An investigation into Jeremy Bamber's brutal murder of his family in Essex, which occurred in 1985. Sentenced for life, he still maintains he is innocent. Is the right person behind bars?

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Murder Of Rhys Jones
programme.desc: The parents of innocent 11-year-old Rhys Jones, shot on his way home from a football club in Liverpool 2007, speak about the harrowing day when they lost their son.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Murder Of Stephen Cameron
programme.desc: Gripping documentary examining the fatal stabbing of 21-year-old motorist Stephen Cameron during a motorway altercation in 1996.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rose West
programme.desc: With her husband Fred, Rose West brutally murdered ten girls between 1973 and 1979, making her one of the most high profile serial killers in the UK.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Alien Encounters
programme.desc: Alien Encounters: A cow is mutilated, a man is repeatedly abducted from his bed, and an astronomer's telescope intercepts a mysterious message.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: The End Of The World
programme.desc: The End of the World: Decoding Mayan texts, a physicist predicts a cataclysm will destroy the world. A NASA scientist makes an alien discovery.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Parallel Worlds
programme.desc: Parallel Worlds: While hiking, a woman has a terrifying encounter with an entity from another world.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Freaks Of Nature
programme.desc: Freaks Of Nature: A small community is devastated by an earth-shattering 'boom,' while an paranormal fog seems to alter the very fabric of time.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Ancient Mysteries
programme.desc: Ancient Mysteries: A girl finds a 1000-year-old skull that may prove aliens once walked the planet, and ancient stone carvings could rewrite the story of evolution.

programme.title: UFOs Declassified: Ufo's Over LA
programme.desc: UFOs over LA: February 1942, and the sky over Los Angeles erupts as anti-aircraft guns begin firing on strange targets. Could this have been an extraterrestrial raid?

programme.title: UFOs Declassified: Red Alert
programme.desc: Red Alert: During the Cold War, strange lights and unidentified objects put governments around the world on red alert. Could extra-terrestrials have been responsible?

programme.title: UFOs Declassified: Black Triangle
programme.desc: Black Triangle: A look at some of the most widely witnessed UFO events ever, including large black triangular objects in the night sky regularly spotted in the 80s and 90s.

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies: Los Angeles, CA
programme.desc: Let the games begin! Pawing off the nationwide search for “America’s Cutest Puppy,” is the Los Angeles competition. Puppies compete from across the area for the local title of “Los Angeles’ Cutest Puppy” and a chance to compete for the national title!

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies: Phoenix, AZ
programme.desc: In a state that holds one of the Seven Natural Wonders of the World, it’s no wonder Arizona is also home to some of the nation’s most adorable puppies!

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies: San Diego, CA
programme.desc: The contest continues this week in the city of San Diego, where puppies come in all shapes and sizes! This city sure knows how to pick ‘em!

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies: Philadelphia, PA
programme.desc: Hide your cheese steaks – here come the dogs! The city of “Pupperly” love plays host to this week’s competition as the dogs get ready to duke it out, Rocky Balboa style!

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies: San Francisco, CA
programme.desc: You may very well leave your heart in San Francisco after you see this litter of playful pups! Don’t let size fool you in this “city by the bay” – these pooches may be small, but they’ve got an overabundance of cuteness.

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies: Atlanta, GA
programme.desc: The competition heads South this week in search of Dixieland’s top dog. While Georgia may be known for peaches, after seeing the crop of pooches in this land, they should be the “Puppy” state!

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies: Boston, MA
programme.desc: The puppies are coming! The puppies are coming! Freezing temperatures can’t keep these Bostonians and their pups away. No matter how cold the weather, the puppies are all “Cheers” and by the end of the day everyone will know their name!

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies: New York, NY
programme.desc: If these puppies can make it here, they can make it anywhere! Here in the Big Apple the pooches are dogged, audacious and will steal your heart in a New York minute!

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies: Chicago, IL
programme.desc: Chicago may be the known as the “Windy City” and true to style, these dogs will blow you away! Puggles and poodles and “All that Jazz” make up this pool of playful pooches.

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies: Miami, FL
programme.desc: Miami may be known as the land of beautiful people, but it’s also the land of beautiful puppies! Look out South Beach – Hurricane CutePuppy is coming at full force and about to knock the flip-flops off these judges!

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies: Grand Finale
programme.desc: After searching the country and sniffing out hundreds of dogs, the ultimate competition has arrived. The ten regional winners from each city have made it out to L.A. to compete for the first-ever title of “America’s Cutest Puppy” and grand prize.

programme.title: Pick A Puppy: S02 Episode 07: Bundle Of Joy
programme.desc: The Johnstone family meets a three different rescue dogs, but can only pick one to give all of their love. Will it be JJ- a Maltese mix, Marley- a Labrador Retriever, or Ruby- a German Shepherd mix?

programme.title: Pick A Puppy: S02 Episode 08: Puppy Day Afternoon
programme.desc: The Nethery family is searching for a new dog to join their active and fun family. They meet West Highland Terriers, the Coton De Tulear, and also the Wheaton Terrier- but they all have to be mindful of Dad's allergies.

programme.title: Pick A Puppy: S02 Episode 09: Puffballs
programme.desc: The Atkinson family visits the Brussels Griffon, Sheltie and Toy Manchester Terrier in hopes of finding a brand new puppy to grow up with their three young children and help teach them responsibility.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Roy Choi’s food reflects a new American idea of "natural" fusion. Bourdain examines the meeting point of Asian, Mexican, Latino culture in modern LA.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode, we leave behind Africa we’ve come to know in the news. Instead, we embrace the wild, untamed land of mystery, adventure, and exoticism; Zanzibar.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Sicily isn’t about fast food or the fast life. It’s about savoring family, life, food and making the most of what you have. Tony will go in search of those foods and their producers and eat his way around the island.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode Tony travels to the lesser-known, North Eastern Coast of Jamaica. White sandy beaches and a cool breeze with a tropical umbrella drink in hand is usually the perception of island life.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode of Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown, Tony travels to Madagascar, a place that outsiders understand surprisingly little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: After eight years, Tony returns to South Korea. And this time, he’s no stranger to kimchi. But just as Tony has changed, so has Korea.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Bourdain looks at the Congo as one of the more industrialized powers in Africa now largely crumbled to nothingness and chaos with Tim Butcher author of Blood River.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown: Mississippi Delta
programme.desc: Tony seeks to challenge his notions of Mississippi by taking a road trip to meet a cast of Mississippians enjoying the diverse foodways and embracing the traditional and contemporary music worlds.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: With the slight relaxation of control by the government of Myanmar, Tony is finally able to explore one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Hampshire
programme.desc: They've got a sailor looking for his first home and a soldier who's about to be made homeless.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Surrey
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil are in Surrey - and at opposite ends of the property ladder.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Bristol & Avon
programme.desc: This week they're in the South West of the country taking on two sets of hapless house hunters.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Bucks & Herts
programme.desc: Buying a house can be romantic, but if you're not careful, things can quickly turn sour.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: New England
programme.desc: This week we are with one couple who have babies on the brain and another who are only 3 months from having one.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Windsor Revisit
programme.desc: About two years ago, first time buyers asked us to guide them. I've come back to see whether or not they lived happily.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Edinburgh Revisit
programme.desc: A year ago, Kirstie and I were pounding the streets of Edinburgh. I've come back to see if all the hard work was worth it.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: The contestants must each serve one dish of their own creation, that features a spice, on the specially designed menu. Under the watchful eye of John, the amateurs will be challenged like never before to deliver dishes of an exceptional standard.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: The Alan Brady Show Presents
programme.desc: It's the first Christmas presentation of 'The Alan Brady Show' where he turns the spotlight upon his talented staff to entertain the TV public.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: The Third One from the Left
programme.desc: A young chorus girl on 'The Alan Brady Show' falls desperately in love with Rob.
programme.sub-title: The Third One from the Left

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: My Husband Is the Best One
programme.desc: Rob's job is threatened by a news article praising him more than Alan for the success of 'The Alan Brady Show.'
programme.sub-title: My Husband Is the Best One

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: The Lady and the Tiger and the Lawyer
programme.desc: When a handsome bachelor moves in next door, Rob and Laura become matchmakers.
programme.sub-title: The Lady and the Tiger and the Lawyer

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: The Life and Love of Joe Coogan
programme.desc: Rob is overwhelmed by jealousy when he meets one of Laura's old flames and later discovers that she saved a box of love poems he sent her.
programme.sub-title: The Life and Love of Joe Coogan

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: A Nice, Friendly Game of Cards
programme.desc: A social game of poker turns sour when it's discovered Rob has been playing with a marked deck.
programme.sub-title: A Nice, Friendly Game of Cards

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: Happy Birthday and Too Many More
programme.desc: When Laura and Rob give Ritchie a birthday party, 63 screaming kids cause a ruckus at the Petrie house.
programme.sub-title: Happy Birthday and Too Many More

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: The Brave and the Backache
programme.desc: Rob consults a psychiatrist to determine whether a series of mysterious ailments are psychosomatic.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: The Pen Is Mightier Than the Mouth
programme.desc: Rob and Buddy find themselves overworked when Sally becomes a television personality overnight.
programme.sub-title: The Pen Is Mightier Than the Mouth

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: My Part-Time Wife
programme.desc: When Laura fills in for Sally at the office, her performance exceeds everyone's expectations.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: Honeymoons Are for the Lucky
programme.desc: Rob recalls the hectic time of his Army marriage to Laura and the difficulty in obtaining a three-day pass for their honeymoon.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: How to Spank a Star
programme.desc: At the insistence of an overbearing guest star, Rob takes over as producer of 'The Alan Brady Show.'

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: The Plots Thicken
programme.desc: A family crisis develops when both Rob and Laura's parents compete to get the couple committed to their respective cemetery plots.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Finals Fish
programme.desc: The chefs cook their fish courses. They're all vying to finish in the top three and still be in with a chance of cooking at the special banquet.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Finals Main
programme.desc: Comedian Ade Edmondson tucks into the chefs' main courses to help decide which three will remain in contention to cook at the special banquet. But the chefs are in for a major surprise as the judges deliver unexpected news about the day's competition.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Finals Dessert
programme.desc: It's judgement day as the chefs not only learn the top three desserts but the judges announce the winning menu. Fast show writer and performer Charlie Higson helps judge the puddings.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Banquet
programme.desc: It's the climax of the competition as the winning chefs cook at the Comic Relief Banquet at the Royal Albert Hall. But it's not plain sailing - the chefs have to contend with getting into the kitchen late.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Scotland Starter
programme.desc: This week it's the turn of the Scottish chefs; Michael Smith, Tony Singh, and Alan Murchison. Today it's the battle of the starters. So which dish is going to fly the flag for Scotland? Will it be cock-a-leekie terrine, pigeon salad, or Scotch pie?

programme.title: Great British Menu: Scotland Fish
programme.desc: Today the Scottish chefs are all fighting for supremacy in the fish course. So who's going to come out on top? Will it be the lobster cocktail cooked four ways, lobster with vegetables, or mussels and langoustine with sorrel soup and tattie scones?

programme.title: Great British Menu: Scotland Main
programme.desc: Today it's the battle of the main courses, as the Scottish chefs go all out to win, with their takes on hogget Scotch pie with peas and carrots, steak and chips with tomato relish and lamb with haggis, pearl barley, and turnip puree.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Scotland Dessert
programme.desc: Today it's the last chance for the Scottish chefs; Michael Smith, Tony Singh and Alan Murchison to show they've got what it takes to win. So which dessert will deliver the sweet smell of success?

programme.title: Race to Dakar

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Which Witch is Which
programme.desc: Umma reevaluates her role as a mother. Appa comes into money and tries to do a good thing with it. Jung and Shannon discover they have different concepts of sexy.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: In the Bedroom
programme.desc: Appa and Umma come up with a new sleeping arrangement. Jung pursues a new career and tries to involve Janet. Meanwhile, Shannon and Kimchee discover a new, slightly terrifying side of Terence.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Jung shows Shannon his nurturing side. Chelsea and Gerald get in the way of Janet's summer plans. Appa is invited to lead a business seminar but is forced to share the spotlight.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Knife Strife
programme.desc: Umma believes she has discovered a murder weapon. Janet realizes she and Nathan have nothing in common. At Handy, Kimchee struggles to fit in with the other regional managers.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Bon Voyage
programme.desc: Appa and Umma's plans for the future push Appa out of his comfort zone. Janet gets an internship overseas while Jung and Kimchee explore new living arrangements.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa reaps the benefits of Umma's accessible parking pass. Janet embraces a new ambition. Meanwhile, Shannon and Jung spice up their long-distance romance.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Channouncements
programme.desc: A local celebrity takes over Umma's announcement duties at church. Appa takes issue with Janet's journaling. Shannon allows shorts in the office.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Appa & Linus

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Tennis Anyone?

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Chance Encounter
programme.desc: Appa and Kimchee enjoy an impromptu hangout together. Janet and Umma find an envelope of money in the store. Jung and Shannon struggle to watch TV together.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Slippery Slope
programme.desc: Appa worries about Umma after a minor household accident. Janet uses Jung's past to boost her reputation with students. A high school reunion has Kimchee thinking about an old flame.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Field of Schemes
programme.desc: Appa's reputation as an impartial umpire faces a stiff test. Jung and Kimchee disagree about discipline. Janet worries a sweater may be haunted.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Who's Pranking Who?

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Matchy Matchy
programme.desc: Umma tries to set up Janet with their new mason. Shannon encourages Jung to give Appa a gift. Kimchee and Shannon work on employee evaluations.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Bridges
programme.desc: A bridge is a structure that’s designed to transcend, but a great bridge can define the place where it stands. Symbols of human ingenuity, beauty, and grandeur, bridges connect us not only to each other but also to the past.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Monuments & Landmarks
programme.desc: Many of the world’s most significant manmade wonders serve not as dwellings, but as powerful signposts. But more than giving us direction, they tell us a story - they characterize powerful forces, or commemorate power lost.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Sacred Sites
programme.desc: Ancient in architecture and detailed in design, these man-made masterpieces stand as testaments to the strength of human faith. These sites endure as a timeless reminder of resilience, respect, and the need to reflect.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Treks
programme.desc: Every journey made by foot promises a grand adventure. From the highest mountains to the wildest jungle realms, treks venture down the road less travelled, allowing us to connect to nature, history, and culture, one step at a time.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Drives
programme.desc: A journey by road expands our horizons, allowing us to explore the depth and breadth of whole countries and continents, stopping whenever and wherever we chose.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Cruises
programme.desc: There is something seductive about setting sail. Cruises offer us a chance to dip our toes into the 70% of our planet awash with oceans, rivers, and lakes, exploring places that can only be reached by daring to leave the shore.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Flights
programme.desc: Our experience of the world’s greatest marvels is literally and figuratively elevated when we explore them from the air. Whether you travel by air balloon, helicopter, light aircraft, a grand perspective is always guaranteed.

programme.title: Arthur: Big Horns George/Bleep
programme.desc: George is inspired to write and perform his own blues song when he's introduced to the music of Koko Taylor. And, D.W. overhears a mysterious word she doesn’t know the meaning of. Can D.W. risk the consequences of blurting out <"BLEEP!">?

programme.title: Arthur: Castles in the Sky/Tipping the Scales
programme.desc: The gang is devastated after their tree house collapses. Can architect Frank Gehry help them to rebuild? Everyone in Arthur's chorus group is excited about their upcoming performance in Crown City.
programme.sub-title: Castles in the Sky/Tipping the Scales

programme.title: Arthur: Francine's Big Top Trouble/George Blows His Top
programme.desc: Francine is sure she will be a star at circus camp. How hard could it be? Then, George is always more than happy to lend his pals whatever they need. But Buster's borrowing gets out of control.
programme.sub-title: Francine's Big Top Trouble/George Blows His Top

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Weighs In/The Law of the Jungle Gym
programme.desc: When Arthur doesn't fit into his costume for the play, he's shocked to learn that he's gotten "husky-sized." He gets serious about getting in shape. Muffy found the perfect place to take pictures with her new digital camera: the jungle gym.
programme.sub-title: Arthur Weighs In/The Law of the Jungle Gym

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Green Thumb/My Fair Tommy
programme.desc: Buster finds out that his collection of old food makes excellent compost--which makes for even better tomatoes! Then, neither of the Tibble twins has ever won the coveted "Good Behavior of the Week" cupcake award.

programme.title: Arthur: Lights, Camera...Opera!/All Worked Up
programme.desc: When Muffy's Dad gives her concert tickets, she couldn't be more excited--until she discovers that she's going to the opera. And Arthur aced five quizzes in a row! But his luck runs out when Mom takes a new job.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Makes Waves/It Came From Beyond
programme.desc: With the community pool closed for repairs and the temperature on the rise, Arthur and D.W. need a place to keep cool. Then, Grandma Thora takes in a stray: an adorable little dog named...Killer?
programme.sub-title: Arthur Makes Waves/It Came From Beyond

programme.title: Arthur: Three's a Crowd/A is for Angry
programme.desc: Prunella's loves doing yoga with her mom, but when her best friend joins them, will she be able to share her time? When Arthur decides to take on The Brain at a checkers competition, everyone rallies behind the underdog.
programme.sub-title: Three's a Crowd/A is for Angry

programme.title: Arthur: The "A" Team/Emily Swallows a Horse
programme.desc: Francine and Brain are the best players on the soccer team, and they wish their teammates could take the game a bit more seriously. And then Emily really wants the sparkly ball D.W. just found, so she tells a little white lie about it.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Beats All/Buster the Myth Maker
programme.desc: After the Tibbles get a set of drums to play at the music festival, D.W. is determined to get an even bigger and louder one. Then, Buster is always telling the most incredible stories, but now he claims there is a tiger in the state forest.
programme.sub-title: D.W. Beats All/Buster the Myth Maker

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Goes Nuts/Breezy Listening Blues
programme.desc: When Binky discovers that he's allergic to peanuts, he has so many questions, but learns that the best way not to go nuts is to be well informed and to understand his allergy. Much to his horror, Brain gets a "B-" on a test.

programme.title: Arthur: Happy Anniversary
programme.desc: Arthur's parents have been married for 10 years and it's time to celebrate! But the festivities are cut short when the van breaks down, stranding the whole family. Will the Reads miss their fancy dinner reservation?

programme.title: Arthur: The Squirrels/Fern and Persimmony Glitchet
programme.desc: After watching the classic horror movie, "The Squirrels," Arthur and his friends are scared to step out into the playground, and everywhere else! Fern's story about perfect Felicity Bonchance is thought perfectly boring by her friends.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Mike & Kristen
programme.desc: Mike met Kristen on Facebook. They quickly forged a deep connection, but Mike's frequent efforts to meet Kristen have been futile. Will Mike finally get face-to-face with Kristen?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Jesse & Brian
programme.desc: Jesse met Brian online. They made plans to meet, but Brian stood her up. Now, years later, Brian has asked her to live with him. But, she can't stop wondering - what is Brian hiding?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Artis & Jess
programme.desc: Five months ago Artis met Jess online. Artis and Jess each were in relationships, but believed they'd found true love. But is Jess everything that she says she is?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Ashley & Mike
programme.desc: For over seven years, Ashley has sent dramatically altered photos of herself to her soul mate, Mike, to make her look thinner and more attractive to him.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Aaliyah & Alicia
programme.desc: Aaliyah has been able to share her life struggles with Alicia. However, despite living only 70 blocks away, Alicia refuses to meet her as she hasn't come out to her friends and family yet.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Nick & Melissa
programme.desc: Nick and Melissa fell in love at age 12 when they met on an online chat room. Now 18, Nick is ready to meet Melissa. But is Melissa the real deal or has Nick been entangled in lies?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Keyonnah & Bow Wow
programme.desc: Superfan Keyonnah can hardly believe her luck, she's almost certain that she's been having an online relationship with her childhood crush, the rapper Bow Wow. Is this too good to be true?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Mike & Caroline
programme.desc: Mike fell in love with Caroline online. He grew suspicious when she continually evaded meeting him, yet left notes at his car. Is Caroline an imposter or is she just afraid?

programme.title: 48 Hours: Last Chance for Justice
programme.desc: A report on the 1980 murder of Marilyn McIntyre, who was found dead in her home. Her husband, Lane, had returned home from work that morning and found her body. As police checked into his alibi, he named his friend Curt Forbes as a potential suspect.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Amanda Knox: The Untold Story
programme.desc: The story of Amanda Knox, an American exchange student who was convicted, along with her Italian boyfriend, Raffaelle Sollecito, of murdering Amanda’s British roommate, Meredith Kercher in 2007.

programme.title: 48 Hours: House of Secrets
programme.desc: In September 2006, Kathy Wangler, wife of anesthesiologist Dr. Mark Wangler, died from carbon monoxide poisoning in their home. Their 30-year marriage had been falling apart; In 2009, investigators concluded that Dr. Wangler had murdered his wife.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Killing Fields
programme.desc: A report about a desolate strip of land between Houston and Galveston where over 30 young women and girls have disappeared or have been murdered.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Boy Next Door
programme.desc: A report on the hunt for a serial killer suspected of murdering three young women from Los Angeles, California to Chicago, Illinois.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Playing With Fire
programme.desc: In September 2002, two men were found executed in a burning Mercedes in an upscale Hollywood neighborhood. What initially looked like a drug-related murder, turned out to be something entirely different, but the crime scene left little evidence to go on.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Dirty Little Secrets
programme.desc: In April 2006, Matt Baker, a pastor from Waco, Texas, returned home to find his wife Kari unconscious, with an empty bottle of Unisom and a suicide note beside her. Police ruled it a suicide. However, her family believed otherwise.

programme.title: 48 Hours: fugitive@hotmail.com
programme.desc: A report on the three-year manhunt and eventual capture of Dr. Yazeed “Yaz” Essa, a Cleveland doctor accused of murdering his wife, Rosemarie. In February 2005, weeks after Rosemarie’s death, tests proved that she had died of cyanide poisoning.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: 1905 Hand-crank Thomas Edison gramophone with cylindrical records; a discontinued Addictor 190 Mini Boat; a rare 1897 Regina music box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Miami Heat
programme.desc: All-terrain Air Commander Hovercraft, a 1970s NASA countdown clock and a one-of-a-kind 1960s Delta Relay rocket.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola
programme.desc: Allen & Ton hit a storage auction in Louisiana's Capitol City and quickly find themselves in trouble with the law! The guys uncover a pair of racing lawnmowers and then stumble on an antique barber chair from the early 1900s!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chi-Town Showdown
programme.desc: Metal Victorian-era burial casket; 1870s glass fire extinguisher grenades; a mechanical 1896 handcrafted Chicago fire station alarm box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Everything's Bigger in Texas
programme.desc: Winchester 1886 rifle invented to kill buffalo; collection of 1950s electric Slot Cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Ton and Allen duke it out with a local thrift store gang at a Brooklyn storage auction. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon designed to fight towering infernos!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Got a Gun
programme.desc: In the affluent area of Mission Hills, CA, Allen and Ton pick up an estate unit that contains a minibike, a Depression-era slot machine and an 1871 Colt revolver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chicago Grand Slam
programme.desc: 1984 Yamaha SS440 Snowmobile that introduced the revolutionary shock absorber suspension; rare autographed 1920s baseball glove; mint Hank Aaron signed baseball; authentic 1950s Robby the Robot collector toy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Battle Bought
programme.desc: Mint 1800s French "Harmonica Pistol" and a collection of '90s remote controlled combat robots.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: The first pump action shotgun - a Winchester Model 1897; a hunter's collection of prize big game, full-body taxidermy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Quadzilla Attacks!
programme.desc: Extreme Quadzilla ATV, the fastest 4 wheeler ever; a 1910s Remington Derringer and an 1880s Palm Squeezer pistol; revolutionary 1800s Western Electric telephone with a crank dial.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Reel Money
programme.desc: 1970's-era Fighting Chair used for big-game fishing; military MILES "laser tag" training system.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Christmas in Mississippi
programme.desc: Photographer Holly returns to Gulfport, Mississippi for Christmas. Their traditional holiday light show has been revived again since a hurricane struck five years earlier. She is shocked to learn the festival is run by her high school sweetheart, Mike.

programme.title: The Christmas Lodge
programme.desc: During a weekend trip to the mountains, Mary finds herself at the now run-down lodge where she spent the holidays with her family growing up. She becomes determined to restore the building to its former glory

programme.title: Holiday in Your Heart
programme.desc: Fourteen-year-old LeAnn Rimes wants nothing more than to sing at the Grand Ole Opry. She is invited to sing at a Christmas concert on Nashville's famous stage, but upon her arrival, she is faced with a difficult decision.

programme.title: The Christmas Dragon
programme.desc: A group of orphans goes on a journey to restore the lost magic and save Christmas.

programme.title: Christmas Child
programme.desc: A life-sized nativity leads a man to learn about his past and lost family.

programme.title: Sarah's House: Curb Appeal, Finale
programme.desc: Most new build homes come with little more than a patch of grass and struggling sapling. Sarah Richardson revises the front-scape of the custom suburban home with plantings and accessories that convey a “been there all along” appeal...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Find And Buy
programme.desc: Sarah jumps onto a hot real estate market to show you how to buy a fixer-upper and make it the house you want right away. The ultimate renovator’s dream is elusive – good bones, the right price and location are everything...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Backyard
programme.desc: Overgrown and unloved, no one can remember when Sarah’s backyard has seen better days. Landscapers and muscle work hand in hand to resurrect this hardscrabble plot into a chic low-maintenance space for year-round enjoyment. Increased privacy...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Kids' Bedrooms
programme.desc: The kids’ bedrooms in Sarah’s House are plagued by awkward layouts and sloped ceilings. A shoestring budget challenges Sarah to transform these tricky spaces into dream escapes for their pint-sized occupants...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Kids' Bath And Lounge
programme.desc: A dingy bathroom, dim hall and a pokey room jump from tired to inspired! Sarah captures every last inch of unused space, re-working the hall, gutting the bathroom and creating a lofty kids’ lounge and study...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Den/home Office
programme.desc: Functioning as den, home office and guest bedroom is a tall order for a tight space. Sarah creates a stylish room with a versatility that can rise to any duty thrown its way. Eliminating coved ceilings...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Master Bedroom
programme.desc: A bland master bedroom gets a wake up call! Sarah doubles the size of the space by knocking down the wall to an adjoining room, and bricks up a never used window to create a long enough wall for the bed...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Master Bathroom
programme.desc: A dingy kitchen and a dirty bathroom become a beautiful master bathroom. Sarah unites these two wretched spaces, cleans them up and creates one gorgeous, stand-alone oasis. Windows, doors...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Living Room/entryway
programme.desc: A dark, cramped living room and foyer do nothing to add appeal to Sarah’s House. Sarah reconfigures the entire space, giving it the grandeur it lacks. Walls come down...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Kitchen/dining Room
programme.desc: A drab kitchen and mock tudor dining room do nothing to arouse the palate. Sarah knocks it into a vast, contemporary kitchen and dining room. Insider tips on finishes...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Basement
programme.desc: Low ceilings, chopped up rooms, damp and mold would turn most potential homebuyers away, but not Sarah! However...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Mudroom/laundry Room
programme.desc: A kid-friendly landing spot and a user-friendly laundry room are high on this house’s priority list. After a full basement excavation, Sarah carves out well-organized...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Curb Appeal
programme.desc: ‘Choose the worst house on the best street’ is good real estate advice and one look at Sarah’s choice shows she listened. Outdated windows, a listing porch, dry rot and an old retaining wall must be addressed to increase safety and curb appeal...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Grand Finale
programme.desc: The dust has settled and Sarah is the proud owner of a brand new house!! Sarah has proved that through solid planning, wise spending and a sense of humour that she can make a difference to her home...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Find + Buy
programme.desc: Sarah’s House is back and is taking on the suburbs! Over 13 episodes cameras track Sarah Richardson as she tackles the renovation of a typical back split room-by-room, bringing today’s sense and style to the entire space...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Nursery + Home Office
programme.desc: Sarah and Tommy squeeze practical style from two small, neglected rooms. The home office takes on a bold, comfortable tone, while the tiny high-ceilinged nursery becomes a serene study in whites, pale grays and blues...

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Impossible Choice
programme.desc: Tensions erupt when Jade asks her parents to move out. After an x-ray, Leah grapples with the possibility that Ali's condition is progressing. Briana and family move into their new house. (S10, ep8)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Piece of Me
programme.desc: Kail celebrates Isaac's birthday while life-changing news weighs on her. Leah reveals secrets about her past. Chelsea tries to change Aubree's visitation agreement with Adam's parents. (S10, ep9)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Do Something
programme.desc: The coronavirus threatens Leah's travel plans and brings up serious concerns for Ali's health. Briana holds a summit with Devoin and Luis to insist they take on financial responsibility. (S10, ep10)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Until the World Ends
programme.desc: The threat of coronavirus intensifies as Chelsea travels for work. Leah and the girls go into self-quarantine to protect Ali. Briana's new fling has the potential for major heartbreak. (S10, ep11)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Remote Control
programme.desc: Despite quarantine, Leah's book release pushes her and Jeremy to confront their past. Jade is forced to close her salon during lockdown. (S10, ep12)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Not So Normal Times
programme.desc: As the country emerges from quarantine, Briana struggles with the decision to send Nova back to school. Kail and Jo struggle with the decision to let Isaac have more say. (S10, ep13)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Bizarre New World
programme.desc: Kail gives birth to her 4th child. Chelsea worries about her health amid Cole's COVID-19 scare. Briana and Devoin fight about finances. Jade calls Sean out for being unmotivated. (S10, ep14)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Tongue-tied
programme.desc: Tensions erupt between Jade and Sean at Kloie's birthday dinner. After their intense text fight, Briana tries to put aside her anger with Devoin for Nova's birthday. (S10, ep15)

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Brooke
programme.desc: After a shotgun wedding, Brooke and Cody are forced to sacrifice car racing for parenthood. Now they're trying to balance high school life and moving in to their own place.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Felicia
programme.desc: The youngest of five, Felicia's the only one in her family with a shot at graduating. But when it gets tough with her boyfriend and she leaves home, will she be forced to drop out?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Emily
programme.desc: Emily, an all-American girl, has to leave her majorette baton and boyfriend behind, as she moves an hour away and faces the pressure of starting over in a new school and town.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Markai
programme.desc: Pregnant Markai and her boyfriend James may be kicked out of her house when her mum has had enough. So will Markai finish school and can their relationship survive James's infidelity?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Aubrey
programme.desc: Aubrey and Brandon must find a home and start over in a new town, all while she tries to get her GED. They get married, but will their fresh start cause them to resent one another? (S2, ep16)

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Christinna
programme.desc: Christinna and Isiah have had to change their college plans as they prepare for their baby. His family is furious when he gives up his scholarship. Can they make it on their own?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kayla
programme.desc: Kayla is a southern belle. Now that she's pregnant, she has to start making her own tough decisions about marriage and her ability to make it without the help of her parents.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Megan
programme.desc: While her dad's in Afghanistan, Megan gets pregnant. But with little money and a video game playing boyfriend not necessarily in for the long haul, she'll have to grow up fast.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Ashley
programme.desc: Ashley is a pregnant high school senior from Texas with no baby daddy weighing in, and a family encouraging her to choose adoption. But when the time comes, what will she decide?

programme.title: Secrets of the Deep: Wrecksploitation
programme.desc: There are more than 3,000,000 shipwrecks in the world, each one with a unique story. The age-old battle between treasure hunters and archaeologists continues to rage as more and more of these wrecks are uncovered.

programme.title: Animal Factory
programme.desc: A young man goes to prison and a tough, older convict takes him under his wing as a mentor.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Castle of Fu Manchu
programme.desc: The Castle of Fu Manchu tries to conquer the world by turning all water into ice.

programme.title: Frankenstein Island

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Appa's Lump
programme.desc: Mr. Kim's friend discovers a lump on Appa's back and he is reluctant to tell his family. Janet needs to attend an important ceremony, but the store has not been closed for twenty years.

programme.title: Cocomelon: Let's Be Friends
programme.desc: In Cocomelon, baby JJ and his siblings go on fun every-day adventures with nursery, play, exploration and learning - situations which any pre-schooler could relate to. Fun, relatable stories set to catchy songs.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Island Nations
programme.desc: Though many are small in stature, they have punched well above their weight on the global stage. Some are rooted in ancient history, while others are only just beginning to realize their full potential.

programme.title: Arthur: Phony Fern/Brain's Shocking Secret
programme.desc: When Fern's parents give her a cell phone for emergencies, she soon becomes hooked on it. Brain is the smartest kid in class. Everyone knows that! What they don't know is that he was kept back in Kindergarten. Will Binky spill the beans?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Miranda & Cameryn
programme.desc: After years of online chats Miranda discovered that Cameryn was not the man he claimed to be. She confronted him only to be given another suspicious profile. Is he someone else entirely?

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death Wish
programme.desc: A report surrounding the July 2009 death of Jeffrey Locker, whose body was found slumped over the steering wheel of his car in Harlem, New York. When authorities tracked Locker’s ATM card to Kenneth Minor, Minor said Locker had begged Minor to kill him.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Money Makin' Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes on the attack & ends up on a collision course with a hardened veteran auction buyer. They uncover a collection of speedy off-road vehicles and some hardcore heavy metal from the turn-of the-century!

programme.title: You Can’t Fight Christmas
programme.desc: Interior designer Leslie Major loves all things Christmas. When she meets handsome Edmund James, she quickly learns he thinks the festivities are frivolous and superficial.

programme.title: Sarah's House: Main Bath
programme.desc: It’s a lesson on maximizing style on a minimal budget. Sarah and Tommy modernize a tired bathroom with new fixed elements like flooring, fixtures and standalone shower...

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Full Circle
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Jade decides to get plastic surgery in Miami, so Briana visits to coach her through her anxiety. Bar goes to court for his outstanding DUI charges. (S10, ep26)

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Danielle
programme.desc: After following her mum's footsteps by becoming a teen mum, Danielle strives to prove she can do things differently. But she soon learns she needs help managing school, a job and a baby.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Zambezi: Wild Water
programme.desc: The Zambezi is one of Africa's most influential rivers. It supports some of the continent's most spectacular wildlife. However, the Zambezi's long and winding journey destroys, as well as creates.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Nile: An African Odyssey
programme.desc: The Nile is the longest river in the world. Ancient Egypt, one of the history's most powerful civilizations, depended hugely upon it. Each year, it flooded, replenishing the fields with fertile silt. This automatic irrigation fueled Egypt's economy.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Virungas: Land of Ice and Fire
programme.desc: It's home to some of the world's most iconic animals  including the African great apes.
programme.sub-title: Virungas: Land of Ice and Fire

programme.title: Secrets of the Deep: WWII Beaufighters
programme.desc: A dogfight lasting a mere 15 minutes over Norwegian fields during WWII. 60 years later, the fjords still guard the secrets of the ten allied planes that were shot down. It is now one of the most important sites in aviation archaeology.

programme.title: Secrets of the Deep: Shipwreck Treasure
programme.desc: Treasure hunters scour the ocean floor in search of shipwrecks and lost riches. The waters off the Florida Keys still hold some of these riches, even a king’s ransom, just waiting to be found.

programme.title: Secrets of the Deep: Sunken Cities
programme.desc: Cities swept into the sea, civilizations lost beneath the waves, but is Atlantis more than a myth? Are there real sunken cities waiting to be discovered? Today, new technology is helping to find lost societies around the globe.

programme.title: Secrets of the Deep: Wrecksploitation
programme.desc: There are more than 3,000,000 shipwrecks in the world, each one with a unique story. The age-old battle between treasure hunters and archaeologists continues to rage as more and more of these wrecks are uncovered.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: A raven-haired enchantress, Cassie Nightingale, mysteriously moves into the local haunted mansion, 'Grey House', and seems to change her neighbors lives using a hint of magic causing many to think she’s a witch.

programme.title: What's Eating Gilbert Grape
programme.desc: Gilbert feels trapped - with no father present and an eccentric family to care for, he is struggling to cope. Despite the hardships Gilbert perseveres, but will he be able to live his own life?

programme.title: Alpha Dog
programme.desc: Inspired by true events, Alpha Dog follows three fateful days when the lives of a group of Southern California teens suddenly dead-ended. The film features a powerful ensemble cast including Sharon Stone, Justin Timberlake, Anton Yelchin and Bruce Willis.

programme.title: Animal Factory
programme.desc: A young man goes to prison and a tough, older convict takes him under his wing as a mentor.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Corpse Vanishes
programme.desc: In the theater, Joel and the Bots get the third installment of "Radar Men from the Moon" before the Bela Lugosi film "The Corpse Vanishes".

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Girl in Gold Boots
programme.desc: A girl from rural California goes to Los Angeles to work as a go-go dancer, but soon gets involved with drug dealers.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Manhunt In Space
programme.desc: Manhunt In Space: An early episode of the soap opera behemoth General Hospital plus a movie made of several TV episodes about space pirates.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Castle of Fu Manchu
programme.desc: The Castle of Fu Manchu tries to conquer the world by turning all water into ice.

programme.title: RiffTrax: House on Haunted Hill: Three Riffer Edition
programme.desc: Long before lunatic millionaires Michael Jackson or Rick Rockwell, there was Vincent Price's Frederic Loren, an eccentric, unhappily married fop who offers a huge cash prize to anyone who can stay overnight in the house on Haunted Hill.
programme.sub-title: House on Haunted Hill: Three Riffer Edition

programme.title: RiffTrax: Brainiac
programme.desc: Back in 1661, a Spanish baron in the middle of burning at the stake escaped by hitching a ride on a passing comet, as one does. And now he returns, 300 years later, a shapeshifting monstrosity bent on killing the descendants of those who wronged him as Th

programme.title: RiffTrax: Planet of Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Planet of Dinosaurs: When a spaceship full of hairy people crashes on an unknown planet, they must forge off on a non-stop mission of wandering around doing nothing in particular.

programme.title: Total Riff Off Episode 6: Brazilian Bigfoot
programme.desc: From the stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 comes RiffTrax, hilarious audio commentaries for your favorite - and not-so-favorite - movies!

programme.title: Frankenstein Island
programme.desc: Directed by B-Movie "icon" Jerry Warren, this is a riffing journey you don't want to miss. And so with great trepidation, Mike, Kevin and Bill hop into a hot air balloon and head off into the wild blue yonder to riff Frankenstein Island!

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: King Neptune's Court
programme.desc: While off jogging, King Neptune spots the mermaid and falls head over heels in love with her. Marina is rather flattered...but as far as Sharko is concerned, no way is that Don Juan of the seas going to hang around his beloved mermaid!

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Cold Snap
programme.desc: A snow storm hits the island and pretty soon, everything is frozen over. An ice floe has even formed in the lagoon, isolating Marina's rock. Since Sharko is stuck in the ice, Zig is home free in order to nab his mermaid! But someone has the same idea…

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Father in Law
programme.desc: Poseidon comes to visit his daughter. Sharko is under pressure to make a good impression. But Poseidon doesn't think the shark is worthy of his daughter. Sharko is devastated. Zig and Bernie offer to help him…

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: VeggieZig
programme.desc: Bernie - disheartened by Zig's ever-ridiculous, vain attempts to catch the mermaid - resolves to put an end to such pathetic demonstrations. With Sharko, he decides to use a pendulum to hypnotise Zig, and persuade him to go vegetarian…

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Spick and Span
programme.desc: It's cleaning day in the castle! Zig and Bernie take advantage to offer their services as cleaners... And if Sharko wants to protect Marina he'll have to do some cleaning too!

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Beach Hero
programme.desc: Zig unintentionally rescues a little crab lost on the beach. He's a hero for Marina and all the beach people! Sharko is not fooled...but Zig uses his popularity to reverse roles and make the shark look like the bad guy!

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Teacher's Pet
programme.desc: Marina decides to teach a class on the beach! Zig decides to enroll in her school. Sharko quickly joins the class too! The duo starts to compete for the teacher's attention, but for very different reasons…

programme.title: Zig & Sharko
programme.desc: After a combination of circumstances, Zig manages to EAT the mermaid! Sharko is devastated, but learns that Hades has a remote device, which means you can revert time! How far must he rewind to bring his beloved back to life?

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Mermaid Fritter
programme.desc: Zig and Bernie come back from hunting empty-handed and a lot worse for wear. Bernie is fed up. He wants a quiet life. He comes up with a plan to convince Zig he has eaten the mermaid…

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Bionic Zig
programme.desc: After picking up the pieces each time Zig tries to catch the mermaid, Bernie decides to 'reinforce' his friend. Presenting the new Bionic Zig! Zig is sure he's invincible and no longer fears Sharko: the mermaid shall be his!

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: A Sweet Tooth
programme.desc: Marina is crazy for candy! Zig has found the ideal bait to lure her into his clutches! Sharko has his work cut out for him. He must protect his sweetheart while teaching her the basics of healthy eating.

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Teen Rebels
programme.desc: Zig finds an old skateboard in a crate. It awakens memories, taking him back to when he, Bernie, Sharko and Marina were teenagers, and all they only cared about were stunts on wheels…

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: The Mummy
programme.desc: A pyramid is discovered on the beach! Marina races inside. Zig and Sharko follow. Marina finds a chamber with a very friendly mummy, while Zig and Sharko get hammered by endless booby traps ...

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Bosom Buddies
programme.desc: Why are the hyena and the hermit crab such good friends? It turns out that in the past a would-be 'mama' raised them side by side…

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: Zig Top Chef
programme.desc: Sharko is a hopeless cook. He decides to train with the best chef on the island: Zig! They get busy with pots, pans, fresh ingredients and exotic herbs. Marina's right there, eager to taste every dish. But she's the one dish Zig wants to taste…

programme.title: Zig & Sharko: High Wired
programme.desc: Marina aims to enter the Book of Records by tightrope-walking the longest distance ever. Sharko is terrified of heights... Zig sees an opportunity to nab the mermaid, beyond the shark's reach!

programme.title: Bangkok Fight Nights: Episode 7

programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a ninja deflect a bullet with his palm? Can a person breathe from a car tire underwater? Will an RFID chip explode in an MRI scanner?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 99

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 149
programme.desc: Is it worse to have an empty beer bottle smashed over your head than a full one? Could ancient armies have used animal hides to build their cannons?

programme.title: Mythbusters Shopping Special

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 153
programme.desc: Can a person be launched 115 feet into a kiddie pool from a giant waterslide? Can a mail delivery truck taking only right turns save gas?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 124

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 13
programme.desc: Myths tested: Could the sinking Titanic suck a person down with it? Does a goldfish's memory only last for seconds? Can explosives packed in a trombone cause the slide to rocket off it?

programme.title: Fear Factor: A Car Crane Collision, Spider Dive

programme.sub-title: Flying High, Junkyard Canine Attack, Vertical Bus Drop

programme.title: Fear Factor: Tug Of War, Roach Cage Escape, Barrels Off Truck

programme.title: Fear Factor: Body Weights, Picnic Basket, Train Drag

programme.sub-title: Body Weights, Picnic Basket, Train Drag

programme.title: Fear Factor: Pig Pen, Rotisserie Chicken In A Basket, Tractor Pull and Escape

programme.sub-title: Pig Pen, Rotisserie Chicken In A Basket, Tractor Pull and Escape

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Expect the Unexpected
programme.desc: Engine troubles on the C-46 during the valley run force Devan to shut down an engine. High winds wreak havoc for Devan and his crew on another C-46 mission to help clean up an oil spill in the Northwest Territories.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Coming Home
programme.desc: Rookie waterbomber pilot Scott gets his first taste of action when Buffalo responds to an emergency callout to fight fires in Alberta. Mikey and Rod think they hit the jackpot when they buy a million dollar firefighting plane on eBay at a bargain price.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Dark Skies
programme.desc: When Yellowknife and the northern aviation community are rocked by three crashes within a month, Joe places an extra emphasis on safety, which is why he only trusts himself to perform a dangerous-looking DC-3 stunt landing for a visiting film crew.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Shut Down
programme.desc: Joe receives a negative visit from Transport Canada when inspectors threaten to shut down the airline. Ray and the Electra crew fly to Sachs Harbour to pick up a unique load - the hides, wool, and meat of 250 musk oxen.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: A Tale of Two Pilots
programme.desc: Weighed down by the responsibility of training a new rampie, and struggling to get out of Joe's doghouse, DC-3 co-pilot Tyler gets a once in a lifetime opportunity to stunt fly in his Cessna 150 for a visiting film crew.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Ice Jam
programme.desc: After taking command of an intense airlift, and dealing with the ugliest Electra load he's ever seen, Scott takes a scary fall on the icy tarmac. City girl Christine moves to Yellowknife to give the unglamorous rampie life a shot.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: A Very Buffalo Christmas
programme.desc: A week before Christmas, Buffalo agrees to lend a hand to an RCMP initiative to fly toys to isolated communities in the north. But a series of problems with the Electra leave the company in a jam.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Crash Landing
programme.desc: Captain Ray Weber leads his crew on a multi-trip mission that requires landing on a rough ice strip on a remote lake. The ice strip landing goes fine, but when the plane takes off from the strip, the right landing gear gets stuck in the wheel well.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Search for the Legendary Striker!

programme.sub-title: The Search for the Legendary Striker!

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Prince of Snow Land!
programme.desc: Raimon are excited and surprised when they finally meet Shawn Frost, but is he really as good as everyone says? There’s only one way to find out, and that’s to play a game against him.

programme.sub-title: Who is the New Ace Striker?

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Hidden Power!

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Royal Academy’s Comeback Part 2!

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Last Wyvern Blizzard!

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Erik Eagle in Serious Trouble!
programme.desc: No sooner do they arrive home, and they’re back on the road again - this time they’re heading to Osaka where it’s rumoured that Alius Academy have a base.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Epsilon - The Toughest Battle Yet!

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Grandpa’s Secret Trick!

programme.desc: Holly rushes to look for sperm donors when she finds out her biological clock is rounding midnight. The guys pledge to find her the perfect match—and who could be more perfect than themselves?

programme.sub-title: How Holly Got Her Groove Back

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: After giving Holly’s new boyfriend Paul a hard time, the guys make amends and Paul invites them to the party of a lifetime. But on the way, Stuart discovers that Paul’s ex-wife might still be in the picture.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Desperate to impress her perfect sister Jill, Holly invents an alternative lifestyle for herself that quickly spirals out of control. Meanwhile, the guys are riding high on a "special" dish cooked up by Stuart.

programme.desc: The gang crashes a party on Phil's boss's yacht, where a very pregnant Eden goes into labor.

programme.title: Eat Yourself Sexy: Annalisa

programme.title: Eat Yourself Sexy: Frances
