programme.desc: Chairman Takeshi Kaga travels to battle the great French chefs. Witness as Iron Chef Sakai and Iron Chef Nakamura battle to defend the honor of Iron Chefs and the Gourmet Academy.

programme.title: Iron Chef: Prawn
programme.desc: Chen must face a man who was his father's trusted apprentice. When they both prepare his father's signature dish, who will win?

programme.title: Iron Chef: Battle Matsutake Mushroom
programme.desc: Iron Chef Sakai meets the challenge from Masamitsu Takahashi on the Japanese theme ingredient matsutake mushroom. Who will reign supreme?

programme.title: Iron Chef: Battle Shark's Fin
programme.desc: Iron Chef Michiba is put to the test by Challenger Hoi Roi Wing. Will he be able to overcome an unexpected obstacle?

programme.title: Iron Chef: Battle Pumpkin
programme.desc: Kouji Kobayashi, a chef of Italian cuisine who was thought to be disappeared, makes a surprise appearance to challenge Iron Chef Chen in the battle of pumpkin.

programme.title: Iron Chef: Battle Angler
programme.desc: How will Iron Chef Michiba prepare anglerfish dishes against his apprentice Yasuo Kawada? Who will prevail in this battle?

programme.title: Iron Chef: Battle Shanghai Crab
programme.desc: In this battle of Shanghai crab, Iron Chef Chen faces off against Tadashi Sugita, the head chef of one of Taiwan's top restaurants, Ginza.

programme.title: Iron Chef: Battle Mackerel
programme.desc: Although not a professional chef, Challenger Tatsuo Umemiya knows his cooking. How far can he go against Iron Chef Michiba in the battle of mackerel?

programme.title: Iron Chef: Battle Quail
programme.desc: How will Iron Chef Sakai battle with Seiya Kawasaki, the challenger who happens to be a master of wild game cooking styles?

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Bird! The Bird!
programme.desc: While venturing in a snowy world, Toad is kidnapped by a nearsighted Birdo who is convinced that he is her missing baby.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Butch Mario & The Luigi Kid
programme.desc: While trying to rescue the Princess from an abandoned mine, the Mario brothers find themselves running from Sheriff Mouser and his minions who are after the large reward Koopa has promised for their capture.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: King Mario of Cramalot
programme.desc: Mario and Co arrive in Cramalot, only to be assualted by Beezos. They are saved by Mervin the magician, who tells them about how Koopa took over Cramalot.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario's Magic Carpet
programme.desc: Mario and Co are traveling through a desert, dying of thirst. Thanks to a boobytrap, they wind up in the palace of Sultan Pasbah, who tries to force Princess into his harem, while the guys are sent to the dungeon.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Rolling Down The River
programme.desc: The Marios and Toad are trying to save Princess from Koopa's riverboat. When their plan goes horribly wrong, Toad gets caught and the Marios barely escape with their lives.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Bonkers from Yonkers
programme.desc: Mario and Co head to the Linguini Empire to attend a benefit spaghetti dinner. When they arrive, Princess and Toad are separated from the Marios and meet Koopa, who's taken over.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario and the Beanstalk
programme.desc: Desperate for cash, the Marios trade the royal cow for bean seeds. Princess scolds them, and accidentally sneezes, blowing the beans into the yard.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Love 'em and Leave 'em
programme.desc: Mario and Co arrive in Rotunda Land, which is ruled by the uptight Queen Rotunda. After being caught, Mario unintentionally gets Rotunda to drink a love potion, causing her to fall in love with him, much to his dismay.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Great BMX Race
programme.desc: To help Toad pay off his debt to Fry Guy, Mario and Luigi enter a bike race in hopes to collect the prize money. But what they don't know is that it's all a trap planned by Koopa.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Two Plumbers and a Baby
programme.desc: The Princess falls into the Fountain of Youth, transforming her into a baby. Now, the Mario Bros. have to protect her while looking for a way to reverse it.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Stars in their Eyes
programme.desc: In the depths of space, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool are all aboard a yellow spaceship, which is currently traveling through a swarm of flaming meteors.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Pirates of Koopa
programme.desc: In Pirate Waters, located in Pirate World, Mario and Luigi are in the middle of peeling potatoes onboard a ship.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Robo Koopa
programme.desc: Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool and Toad have ventured to Robo Land in pursuit of King Koopa, whom they had intended to stop.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Count Koopula
programme.desc: In a dark forest, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool are running frantically through pouring rain, in a mysterious place called Turtlevania.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Jungle Fever
programme.desc: In the Amazon Jungle, Mario, using a plunger to swat his way through a variety of flora, leads Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool in their search for Dr. Sheldon, a mysterious witch doctor.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario of the Deep
programme.desc: Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool and Toad have travelled to the underwater kingdom of Aqua Land in a submarine built from a bathtub in order to fight against BarraKoopa.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rose West
programme.desc: With her husband Fred, Rose West brutally murdered ten girls between 1973 and 1979, making her one of the most high profile serial killers in the UK.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Keith Blakelock
programme.desc: In 1985, PC Keith Blakelock was murdered during a riot on a housing estate in London, triggered after a black woman died of heart failure during a house search. Nobody has been brought to justice for his murder, despite three investigations.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Omagh Bombing
programme.desc: Survivors, victims' relatives and former detectives reflect on the Real IRA car bomb that killed 29 people in Omagh, Northern Ireland in 1998.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Crossbow Cannibal
programme.desc: Former friends of Stephen Griffiths open up about the Bradford serial killer, who was caught firing a crossbow through Suzanne Blamires' head in 2010.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Jimmy Savile
programme.desc: Jimmy Savile: From national treasure to one of the UK's most notorious sex offenders: this is the story of how the revelation of Jimmy Savile's crimes left the UK reeling.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Philpotts
programme.desc: When six children died in a house fire in Allenton, Derby in May 2012 it shocked the nation. Parents Mick and Mairead Philpott were charged with the murders. We uncover the reasons behind the arson attack on their own home.

programme.title: Britain's Darkest Taboos: My Pregnant Daughter Was Strangled To Death By Her Boyfriend - Jayden Parkinson
programme.desc: Jayden, young, beautiful and the new girl, becomes hooked on bad boy Ben Blakely. Despite her friends' warnings that he’s no good for her, Jayden doesn’t listen. However, no one dreamed that he was capable of killing her.
programme.sub-title: My Pregnant Daughter Was Strangled To Death By Her Boyfriend - Jayden Parkinson

programme.title: Britain's Darkest Taboos: Our Daughter And Granddaughter Were Murdered On The Same Day
programme.desc: Nikitta Grender’s family and friends speak out about her murder, just days before she was due to give birth.
programme.sub-title: Our Daughter And Granddaughter Were Murdered On The Same Day

programme.title: UFOs Declassified: Black Triangle
programme.desc: Black Triangle: A look at some of the most widely witnessed UFO events ever, including large black triangular objects in the night sky regularly spotted in the 80s and 90s.

programme.title: UFOs Declassified: UFO Crash Sites
programme.desc: Alien autopsies, secret military files, and recovered pieces of an extra-terrestrial spacecraft: this is the story of the Roswell incident and the truth behind the UFO.

programme.title: UFOs Declassified: UFOs vs Airlines
programme.desc: UFO's vs Airlines: Are UFOs a threat to civil aviation? The culture of silence within the aviation industry could speak volumes.

programme.title: UFOs Declassified: Shoot 'Em Down
programme.desc: Shoot 'Em Down: Fighter pilots from the UK to Peru have encountered UFOs. What happens when a UFO gets too close for comfort?

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Falling Man, Space Rocks, Missing Feet
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Falling Man, Space Rocks, Missing Feet: A high-rise window washer somehow survives a 50-storey fall and ball-sized ice chunks fall from the sky.
programme.sub-title: Falling Man, Space Rocks, Missing Feet

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Stargate Portals
programme.desc: Discover doorways to wormholes in time, their secret locations around the world, as well as who is trying to open them and why.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Top 10 Conspiracies Of All Time
programme.desc: Those in power have secrets they do not want average citizens to know.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Remote Viewing
programme.desc: Documents may prove that the government has a secret group of remote viewers watching its citizens: the CIA's 'psy ops army'.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Fake World Leaders
programme.desc: Fake World Leaders: Are Hitler, Saddam Hussein and Osama Bin Laden really dead? Experts find proof that several infamous world leaders didn't die when you think they did.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: America's Alien Wars
programme.desc: Has our government been at war with alien aggressors for the past half century? Startling evidence indicates that the US military has been under attack and has kept it from the public.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Time Travel
programme.desc: Evidence suggests that time travel may have occurred in the past.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Nazis Today
programme.desc: For decades, there have been rumours key members of Hitler’s inner circle escaped the fall of Berlin - maybe even the Führer himself. But where did they go and what is their plan?

programme.title: Pick A Puppy: S02 Episode 09: Puffballs
programme.desc: The Atkinson family visits the Brussels Griffon, Sheltie and Toy Manchester Terrier in hopes of finding a brand new puppy to grow up with their three young children and help teach them responsibility.

programme.title: Pick A Puppy: S02 Episode 10: New Companion
programme.desc: The Bhatti family is ready for their first puppy. While they visit the Cairn Terrier, the Dutch Sheep Dog and also the Yorkie Poo their young son hoping that one of these breeds will be a buddy he can call his own.

programme.title: Pick A Puppy: S02 Episode 11: Marco Polo
programme.desc: The Pascoe family is ready to love again after the recent passing of their first family dog. They visit three different breeds - but have a hard time deciding. Will it be the Australian Shepherd, the Golden Retriever or the Viszula?

programme.title: Pick A Puppy: S02 Episode 12: Love Times Two
programme.desc: The Haggith family is visited by three rescue dogs that all deserve a loving home: Benny- a Lhasa Apso mix, Gibson- a Maltese mix and finally Baron- a Dashcund/Poodle mix. But only one rescue can be a match for them, and their current family dog.

programme.title: My Pet's Gone Viral: Episode 8
programme.desc: Dog cleans house, UK / Sponge: 53 Cat slaps Dog / Baby and Puppy Meet for first time, 9.5 million (UK)

programme.title: My Pet's Gone Viral: Episode 1
programme.desc: Jecht: Canada Dog / Alarm Clock Kitty 4.5 million views / Linus – Bulldog & baby 24,500,000 hits.

programme.title: My Pet's Gone Viral: Episode 2
programme.desc: Cat Cries Like A Baby, 2.6 million / Dexter & Peppermint / Denver Guilty Dog – 24 million views.

programme.title: Superstar Dogs: Episode 3
programme.desc: This episode's three competitors are Kathryn and Labradoodle Fergus, John and Staffordshire Bull Terrier Coco, and Jenny and Papillion Cross Lily-Rose. Who will make it through to the semi-finals?

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers With Alan Davies: Episode 5
programme.desc: More cases for the team of inspectors who protect dogs.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers With Alan Davies: Episode 6
programme.desc: More cases for the dedicated team of inspectors.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers With Alan Davies: Episode 7
programme.desc: More cases for the dedicated team of inspectors.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers With Alan Davies: Episode 2
programme.desc: Ceci, an 18-month-old Chihuahua loves her food too much.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: With the slight relaxation of control by the government of Myanmar, Tony is finally able to explore one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, Tony returns to one of his favourite places on Earth, Vietnam.He journeys to a city he has never been to, Hu?, The City of Ghosts.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony travels to Shanghai. Forget the antiquated views you might hold about a communist-run, creativity-devoid State of androids. The modern China is a vibrant, dynamic monument to capitalism.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Few countries have a more contentious relationship with the United States than Iran. In this episode we heads to this Shia Muslim nation to explore a country few Americans have visited since the 80s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: The first time Tony visited Beirut, it didn't end well. Now Tony is back in Beirut, where all the world’s troubles and all the world's good comes together to form a city like no other.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony explores a few of the many faces of Miami. Chef Michelle Bernstein takes Tony out to an authentic Cuban breakfast and a late-night dinner at a gas station café in Doral.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: This unique episode looks closely at the “other” Massachusetts far away from the blue blood getaways of Nantucket or the urban sprawl of Boston that most people know so little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony explores what Burroughs called "Interzone," where artists sought escape from Western moral prohibitions and the possibilities of great empty spaces. But what is it like now?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: The contestants must each serve one dish of their own creation, that features a spice, on the specially designed menu. Under the watchful eye of John, the amateurs will be challenged like never before to deliver dishes of an exceptional standard.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Kent
programme.desc: 20-somethings Sophie and Niall are ready to buy their first place. They say they want something practical-but it soon becomes clear that for super-fussy Sophie- practical is no match for party pad.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Wiltshire
programme.desc: One couple want room for 4 children and a 4x4 business -whilst the other want a place that will 'give them a big hug' whenever they walk through the door!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: South East England
programme.desc: One family is stuck in a house bursting at the seams and the other is stuck in one room at mum and dads. It's a quest for space-and it's up to Kirstie and Phil to make these searches blast off.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Southbank
programme.desc: We have a teenager with an epic budget keen for independence; and a young couple with high hopes that their funds will stretch to the dream flat. Kirstie and Phil are on their home turf –can they secure a famous victory?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Greater London
programme.desc: This week-Kirstie and Phil are in London-with a story of Vicars and Knickers....

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Home Counties & North Yorks Revist
programme.desc: In Yorkshire, Trudi & Steve were moving to be closer to family-whilst in Luton, Zena wanted to get out of mum and dad's.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: The Plots Thicken
programme.desc: A family crisis develops when both Rob and Laura's parents compete to get the couple committed to their respective cemetery plots.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: Scratch My Car and Die
programme.desc: A scratch on Rob's new car causes a domestic crisis at the Petrie house.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: The Return of Edwin Carp
programme.desc: Rob attempts to coax a legendary radio star out of retirement for a TV special.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: October Eve
programme.desc: An oil painting of Laura is being shown at an art gallery and although she posed fully clothed, the artist took the liberty of 'undraping' her.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: Dear Mrs. Petrie, Your Husband Is In Jail
programme.desc: Rob goes to see an old Army buddy's nightclub act and winds up spending the night in jail.
programme.sub-title: Dear Mrs. Petrie, Your Husband Is In Jail

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: My Neighbor's Husband's Other Life
programme.desc: Rob and Laura suspect their neighbor Jerry is having an affair after spotting him at a fancy restaurant with a pretty blonde.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: I'd Rather Be Bald Than Have No Head at All
programme.desc: Fearing he may be going bald, Rob tries a barber's secret recipe which consists of ingredients usually reserved for a salad.
programme.sub-title: I'd Rather Be Bald Than Have No Head at All

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: Teacher's Petrie
programme.desc: Laura's new writing teacher, Mr. Caldwell, thinks she shows promise but Rob is skeptical of his intentions.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: My Mother Can Beat Up My Father
programme.desc: Laura proves herself more proficient than Rob in the art of self-defense.
programme.sub-title: My Mother Can Beat Up My Father

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: The Ghost of A. Chantz
programme.desc: Rob, Laura, Sally and Buddy spend a frightening night in a haunted cabin at a mountain resort.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: The Lady and the Baby Sitter
programme.desc: Rob and Laura are unaware that their teenage babysitter has a crush on Laura.
programme.sub-title: The Lady and the Baby Sitter

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: A Vigilante Ripped My Sports Coat
programme.desc: Rob's friendship with Jerry is almost destroyed in a feud over a neighbor's crabgrass.
programme.sub-title: A Vigilante Ripped My Sports Coat

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: The Man from 'Emperor'
programme.desc: When Rob is offered a job as a humor consultant at a magazine for man-about-town, he runs into trouble with Laura.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Scotland Dessert
programme.desc: Today it's the last chance for the Scottish chefs; Michael Smith, Tony Singh and Alan Murchison to show they've got what it takes to win. So which dessert will deliver the sweet smell of success?

programme.title: Great British Menu: Scotland Judging
programme.desc: It's judgment day on Great British Menu and the two chefs who battled their way through yesterday, cook their entire menus for the Great British Menu judges, Prue Leith, Matthew Fort and Oliver Peyton.

programme.title: Great British Menu: North West Fish
programme.desc: Today sparks fly as the chefs from the North West – Johnnie Mountain, Lisa Allen and Aiden Byrne are fighting to win the fish course. So which dish is going to be king?

programme.title: Great British Menu: North West Main
programme.desc: Today it's the battle of the main courses, as the chefs from the North West – Aiden Byrne, Lisa Allen and Johnnie Mountain – square off. The main course is a pivotal point of the judging, so which dish will get top marks?

programme.title: Great British Menu: North West Dessert
programme.desc: Today it's the last chance for the chefs – Lisa Allen, Johnnie Mountain and Aiden Byrne to prove they are fit to cook at this year's prestigious banquet. So which dessert will former champion Marcus Wareing award top marks?

programme.title: Great British Menu: Central Starter
programme.desc: This week it's the turn of the chefs from the Central region – Daniel Clifford, Richard Bainbridge and Will Holland. Today they're launching their culinary assault with the starters.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Central Fish
programme.desc: Today the chefs from the Central region – Richard Bainbridge, Daniel Clifford and Will Holland are all out to impress with their fish dishes: crab in barley soup with smoked oyster, hay-baked rainbow trout and beetroot cured sea trout.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Central Main
programme.desc: Today it's the battle of the main courses, as the chefs from the Central region – Daniel Clifford, Richard Bainbridge and Will Holland - square off. So which dish will get top marks?

programme.title: Great British Menu: Central Dessert
programme.desc: Today it's the last chance for the chefs from the Central region - Richard Bainbridge, Will Holland and Daniel Clifford - to prove they've got what it takes to cook at this year's fabulous banquet.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Central Judging
programme.desc: It's judgment day on Great British Menu. One chef left the competition yesterday and now two are left to go head to head, as they cook their entire menus for the Great British Menu judges, Prue Leith, Matthew Fort and Oliver Peyton.

programme.title: Great British Menu: South West Starter
programme.desc: This week it's the turn of the chefs from the South West - Henry Herbert, John Hooker and Nathan Outlaw. Today they begin their menus with the starters; rabbit with pea mousse, ham hock with pea puree and heather smoked macon with pickled beetroot.

programme.title: Extreme Frontiers: Episode 1
programme.desc: From abseiling down the peak of Cape Town’s iconic Table Mountain to Learning how to do Rodeo the hard way in Maple Creek Saskatchewan Canada, prepare for a non-stop Roller coaster ride.

programme.title: Extreme Frontiers: Episode 2
programme.desc: From abseiling down the peak of Cape Town’s iconic Table Mountain to Learning how to do Rodeo the hard way in Maple Creek Saskatchewan Canada, prepare for a non-stop Roller coaster ride.

programme.title: Off Limits: Lyle Lovett And His Large Band
programme.desc: It’s 7:00 p.m. in Fort Worth, Texas. There is a buzz in the Bass Performance Hall as 2,000 people sit underneath the golden dome waiting to be more than entertained. They are anticipating a full-out frontal assault of charm and wit.
programme.sub-title: Lyle Lovett And His Large Band

programme.title: Off Limits: 8 Wing Pilot Training
programme.desc: This may be the most appropriately named vehicle in the world. It is an absolute brute. The Hercules CC-130 can haul 90 soldiers more than 6,000 miles and set down on short, ragged runways where other planes wouldn’t dream of landing.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive: Jaws Of The Death
programme.desc: A conservationist survives an airplane crash in Zimbabwe. Suffering severe injuries Greg must do everything he can to survive until help arrives.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive: Kidnap In The Killing Fields
programme.desc: Drama-doc telling the true story of Chris Moon, who was kidnapped by the Khmer Rouge while clearing land mines in Cambodia and talked his way back to freedom.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive: Trapped By a Boulder
programme.desc: When a rockslide pins Warren and prevents him from moving, he must hold out in hopes that his friend Geert will climb down the mountain and return with help

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Matchy Matchy
programme.desc: Umma tries to set up Janet with their new mason. Shannon encourages Jung to give Appa a gift. Kimchee and Shannon work on employee evaluations.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Hugs & Prayers
programme.desc: Janet and Appa take a first aid course. Umma worries her prayers cause more harm than good. Shannon and Jung discuss their relationship.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Friends and Family
programme.desc: Jung gives Appa and Umma a business presentation for the store. Shannon and Kimchee's office teasing leads to a meaningful discovery for Kimchee.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Gay Discount
programme.desc: Mr. Kim offers a gay discount at the store, while Mrs. Kim tries to find Janet a cool, Christian, Korean boyfriend.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Janet's Photos
programme.desc: Mr. Kim gets competitive with Janet over who is the better photographer. When Jung applies for a promotion, it has a surprising effect on Mrs. Kim and Kimchee.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Ddong Chim
programme.desc: Jung draws the wrong kind of attention from his boss when he gives Kimchee a Korean wedgie at work. Mr. Kim commissions Janet's friend Gerald to take his photo instead of asking Janet.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Frank and Nayoung
programme.desc: Mr. Kim is frustrated with Frank, a repairman who talks too much, while Janet's cousin Nayoung visits from Korea, challenging Janet's sense of what it means to "be Korean."

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Wingman
programme.desc: Mr. Chin asks Mr. Kim to be his wingman on a date, which is fine until Mrs. Kim tags along. Janet asks Jung to help her fix a dripping pipe at the store, but the repair is interrupted by an intruder.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Rude Kid
programme.desc: Mr. Kim disciplines Janet's professor's kid, with unexpected results for Janet. Jung discovers that Kimchee has found a questionable way to make extra money.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Hapkido
programme.desc: Jung runs into an old flame at work. Meanwhile, Appa is less than impressed with the methods used by Janet's hapkido teacher.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Service
programme.desc: A new female pastor strikes a chord with Appa. Jung's worlds collide when his friend starts dating his sister.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Best Before
programme.desc: Are "Best Before" dates on canned food meaningless? Appa is about to find out. Meanwhile, Jung surprises his mom by helping out at church.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Janet's New Job
programme.desc: When Janet lands a new job that actually pays, Gerald steps in to fill her shoes at the convenience store.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Handyman
programme.desc: Mr. Kim fixes a toilet for Kimchee. Janet believes there is more to Edwin and Mrs. Kim's relationship.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Appa's Lump
programme.desc: Mr. Kim's friend discovers a lump on Appa's back and he is reluctant to tell his family. Janet needs to attend an important ceremony, but the store has not been closed for twenty years.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Flights
programme.desc: Our experience of the world’s greatest marvels is literally and figuratively elevated when we explore them from the air. Whether you travel by air balloon, helicopter, light aircraft, a grand perspective is always guaranteed.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Land Adventures
programme.desc: Most land adventures come with some risk - a chance to confront our deepest fears, resist the pull of the ordinary, and soar into the wild unknown.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Water Adventures
programme.desc: We are captivated by oceans, rivers, and lakes - the power, the flow, the reflective stillness. And as we seek to get closer, we immerse ourselves in an expanding range of aquatic experiences.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Archipelagos
programme.desc: The romantic notion of island life has always attracted us. Explore the histories, cultures, and unique ways of life on the World’s Greatest Archipelagos - clusters of islands that share common bonds of geography, geology, and genealogy.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Island Arks
programme.desc: Cut off from continents, remote islands have become floating arks, attracting migrating species and forging new ones. Take a privileged glimpse into the secret lives of the rare and exotic species that inhabit these lost worlds.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Volcanic Islands
programme.desc: They've been worshiped and feared over the millennia. But in the wake of drama and destruction, the elements give rise to cultures and nations so beautiful that we've come to know them as the world's greatest volcanic islands.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Island Nations
programme.desc: Though many are small in stature, they have punched well above their weight on the global stage. Some are rooted in ancient history, while others are only just beginning to realize their full potential.

programme.title: Arthur: The Squirrels/Fern and Persimmony Glitchet
programme.desc: After watching the classic horror movie, "The Squirrels," Arthur and his friends are scared to step out into the playground, and everywhere else! Fern's story about perfect Felicity Bonchance is thought perfectly boring by her friends.

programme.title: Arthur: Desert Island Dish/The Secret About Secrets
programme.desc: When Mr. Ratburn challenges the class to find the perfect food for surviving on a desert island, everyone picks potato chips or ice cream! D.W. is told a secret and quickly learns that keeping one is a lot harder than she thought.
programme.sub-title: Desert Island Dish/The Secret About Secrets

programme.title: Arthur: Feeling Flush/Family Fortune
programme.desc: During a drought, Francine bets Arthur that her family can use less water than his. The TV show, Treasure Caravan, is coming to Elwood City! Arthur and D.W. are convinced they'll find treasures that will make them rich and famous.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Aims High/Flaw and Order
programme.desc: D.W. wants to be the first person to set foot on Mars! But what if scary purple aliens eat her? Who's responsible for cracking Dad's cake platter? DUN-DUN! All the evidence points to Arthur!

programme.title: Arthur: The Curse of the Grebes/Arthur Changes Gears
programme.desc: The Elwood City Grebes haven't won the Baseball Championship since 1918. But with the addition of three players, the title is finally within reach. Arthur finally saves enough money to buy the bike of his dreams!
programme.sub-title: The Curse of the Grebes/Arthur Changes Gears

programme.title: Arthur: Unfinished/D.W., Bossy Boots
programme.desc: Arthur is completely riveted by a book and can't wait to see how it ends. But the last few pages are missing! Now what? For D.W., there's nothing better than getting her own way--that is, until all her friends stop playing with her.

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Vs. Binky/Operation: DW!
programme.desc: Binky may be tough and strong, but when it comes to sports, he always seems to choke. D.W. is having trouble hearing and needs an ear operation. Is it okay to be just a little bit scared?

programme.title: Arthur: Do You Speak George?/World Girls
programme.desc: Everyone at school is speaking their own made-up language, and George can't make sense of what anyone is saying. And it's the grand opening of World Girl World, which sells dolls from every country, and every girl in town is thrilled!

programme.title: Arthur: What's Cooking?/Buster's Special Delivery
programme.desc: Celebrity chef Ming Tsai is judging Lakewood Elementary's first-ever cooking contest, and Arthur thinks he has a shot at winning. Then, Buster volunteers to deliver the school mail and finds out that his new job is actually hard work!

programme.title: Arthur: Swept Away/Germophobia
programme.desc: Arthur, D.W. and Buster are spending a few days at the beach. Can they save their sandcastle from the ocean tides? Buster's friends have had enough of his sloppy habits, so they band together to educate him on the realities of bacteria.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Sells Out/Mind Your Manners
programme.desc: To earn the money for a new video game, Arthur decides to sell his old toys through his school's Web site. The Tibble Twins want to take Grandmother out to dinner, but she'd rather stay home. Is it because of their terrible table manners?

programme.title: Arthur: Buenas Noches, Vicita/Prunella Packs It In
programme.desc: Vicita Molina has lost her favorite bedtime book – can Arthur help her re-create it? Prunella is already starting to think about college! Will she crack under the heavy load or will she learn to relax and do the things she actually enjoys?
programme.sub-title: Buenas Noches, Vicita/Prunella Packs It In

programme.title: Arthur: Phony Fern/Brain's Shocking Secret
programme.desc: When Fern's parents give her a cell phone for emergencies, she soon becomes hooked on it. Brain is the smartest kid in class. Everyone knows that! What they don't know is that he was kept back in Kindergarten. Will Binky spill the beans?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Mike & Caroline
programme.desc: Mike fell in love with Caroline online. He grew suspicious when she continually evaded meeting him, yet left notes at his car. Is Caroline an imposter or is she just afraid?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Craig & Zoe
programme.desc: Craig's sister introduced him to a beautiful girl named Zoe on Facebook. After talks online of a future life together, things turn sour. Now he wants to know who he gave his heart to.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Antwane & Tony
programme.desc: Nev and Max are contacted by Carmen who is sounding the alarm on behalf of her cousin, Antwane. He's been in a three-year romance with a man named Tony that he met on a telephone chat line.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Antoinette & Albert
programme.desc: A year after meeting 'T-lights' on Instagram, 'instaceleb' Antoinette is ready to meet him, but he always brushes off the idea. Is he really the online celebrity he claims to be?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Lucille & Kidd Cole
programme.desc: Lucille led a simple life until she was asked to work for music producer Kidd Cole. Companies were never paid and one day Kidd couldn't be found. Will she get the answers she needs?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Tracie & Sammie
programme.desc: Tracie Thoms had a connection with a fan named 'Sammie' after hearing about the passing of Sammie's friend. Sammie suddenly disappeared and now Tracie is left wondering who Sammie really is?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: John & Kelsey
programme.desc: John is ready to leave Detroit but one thing holds him back: Kelsey. The two have never spoken outside of online chats but John is sure she's the one. Can he include Kelsey in his plans?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Solana & Elijah
programme.desc: Solana is in a relationship with Danny but can't stop thinking about her online love Elijah. His photos were used in so many profiles that she has to know is this the real Elijah?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Miranda & Cameryn
programme.desc: After years of online chats Miranda discovered that Cameryn was not the man he claimed to be. She confronted him only to be given another suspicious profile. Is he someone else entirely?

programme.title: 48 Hours: fugitive@hotmail.com
programme.desc: A report on the three-year manhunt and eventual capture of Dr. Yazeed “Yaz” Essa, a Cleveland doctor accused of murdering his wife, Rosemarie. In February 2005, weeks after Rosemarie’s death, tests proved that she had died of cyanide poisoning.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Hunt for Mr. Wright
programme.desc: A report on George Wright, who was sentenced to prison for the 1962 murder of New Jersey service station owner Walter Patterson, and who after spending 8 years in prison, escaped, and spent 40 years on the run from the authorities.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Chasing the Barefoot Bandit
programme.desc: A report on Colton Harris-Moore, also known as the “Barefoot Bandit,” because of his habit of committing crimes barefoot and leaving chalk outlines of his feet; and whose exploits included stealing planes, guns, yachts, and escaping to foreign countries.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Secrets, Lies and Alibis
programme.desc: John and Susan Sutton were sleeping in separate rooms in their Florida home, when a gunman entered their house and shot both of them several times. Susan was killed, but John survived. Nothing was taken from the house, proving the murder premeditated.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Long Island Serial Killer
programme.desc: A report on the disappearance of Shannan Gilbert, near Gilgo Beach, New York. The search for Shannan led to the discovery of a total of ten bodies in the scrub brush of Gilgo Beach, leading police to suspect the work of a serial killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: Hunting Humans
programme.desc: In July 2007, Shea McDonough returned home and left the back door open for her brother, not knowing he wasn’t coming home for the night. Hours later, when her father went to her room to check on her, he saw a masked man standing over her with a knife.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Every Picture Tells A Story
programme.desc: On February 15, 2009, Cathy McNaughton was stabbed to death in her home in Sharpsburg, Georgia. The day had started with her husband Alec serving her breakfast in bed.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death Wish
programme.desc: A report surrounding the July 2009 death of Jeffrey Locker, whose body was found slumped over the steering wheel of his car in Harlem, New York. When authorities tracked Locker’s ATM card to Kenneth Minor, Minor said Locker had begged Minor to kill him.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Got Balls
programme.desc: After returning to LA, Ton & Allen head deep into hostile auction hunter territory and butt heads with a familiar old foe! They discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle and one of the most accurate rifles ever made!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hot Wheels
programme.desc: '70s sand rail dune racer with rally hemi heads; 1965 replica Mustang pool table; off-road racing gear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Weapons of Past Destruction
programme.desc: Knowing that Hollywood auctions are hit-and-miss, Allen and Ton buy inexpensive lockers that contain a polygraph machine, a samurai sword and a pair of Civil War shotguns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Dead Aim
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face-off against an auction buyer with shady bidding tactics and even more questionable fashion sense. The guys find a custom-built monowheel & a rifle designed to ward off grave robbers in the early 19th century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Diesel Digs
programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Bowling Pin Payday
programme.desc: Allen & Ton visit Ton's old stompin' ground and go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They uncover a 19th century rifle with a matching cutlass bayonet and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the early 1960's!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Friends in Hawaii Places
programme.desc: Allen &Ton enlist an assistant, Carolyn, and Allen's Hawaiian buddy, Junior, to help them battle local buyers. The guys find a WWII-era motor scooter and a stash of antique Polynesian tattoo tools that get used on Ton!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rodeo Ton
programme.desc: 1970s El Toro mechanical bull used to train bull riders; silver WWII era banjo; a collection of 1800s handcrafted hunting duck decoys.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Home on the Gun Range
programme.desc: Barely making it to an auction in Corona, CA, Allen and Ton buy an overstuffed unit and find an antique crossbow, a rare 10-gauge Winchester shotgun and a 1940s Kiss-o-Meter.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Shuffle
programme.desc: Ton and Allen teach a cocky new auction hunter a lesson. They spot a 1940's-era shuffleboard table and uncover an early hot rod made from the fuel tank of a WWII fighter plane!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Money Makin' Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes on the attack & ends up on a collision course with a hardened veteran auction buyer. They uncover a collection of speedy off-road vehicles and some hardcore heavy metal from the turn-of the-century!

programme.title: Christmas Child
programme.desc: A life-sized nativity leads a man to learn about his past and lost family.

programme.title: Pete's Christmas
programme.desc: A put-upon teen finds himself reliving the same miserable Christmas day over and over again. Starring: Bruce Dern, Zachary Gordon, Molly Parker, Rick Roberts, Marshall Williams.

programme.title: The Christmas Consultant
programme.desc: This Lifetime Original Movie stars David Hasselhoff as a sought after consultant hired by a workaholic mother (Caroline Rhea) in an effort to get her and her family through the holidays.

programme.title: You Can’t Fight Christmas
programme.desc: Interior designer Leslie Major loves all things Christmas. When she meets handsome Edmund James, she quickly learns he thinks the festivities are frivolous and superficial.

programme.title: Sarah's House: Nursery + Home Office
programme.desc: Sarah and Tommy squeeze practical style from two small, neglected rooms. The home office takes on a bold, comfortable tone, while the tiny high-ceilinged nursery becomes a serene study in whites, pale grays and blues...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Master Bedroom
programme.desc: This is one absolutely bland, beige and boring master. Sarah ups the comfort and romance factors, not before addressing moldy non-insulated closets, creaky, old wood floors...

programme.title: Sarah's House: High/low Bathrooms
programme.desc: After the kitchen, bathrooms are the most important and expensive renovations in the home. At Sarah’s House both family and basement baths give way to the wrecking ball; one becomes a showcase combination for the master...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Guest Suite
programme.desc: Another great idea from Sarah’s House! Sarah transforms unused basement space into a multi-purpose suite that works for temporary and long-term visitors, including the boomerang generation. This newly captured room brims with five-star features...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Storage, Laundry
programme.desc: Storage is one of the most important and complex issues in any home. Sarah makes every nook and cranny accountable by incorporating storage you don’t even notice is there. As for the laundry room, Sarah creates a colorful...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Backyard
programme.desc: Sarah steps up to a large yard untouched since the house was built. Stone work, landscaping and green space set the foundation for a jewel-like pool and cabana...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Tween Bedroom
programme.desc: A bare bones room at home anywhere. Sarah and Tommy set a budget challenge of $2,500 to bring this unused space up to the demanding specs of this fickle generation...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Family Room
programme.desc: Sarah breaks down the walls of this nowhere space to make a family room that serves a multitude of purposes. While the design scheme skews male, it’s meant to welcome all with comfort and style...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Living Room, Front Entry
programme.desc: This is purely a case of making the most of what you’ve got. Sarah unites a dated living room and entryway, giving them modern appeal and flexibility. A sense of drama comes via a heightened doorway and new set of stairs...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Kitchen + Dining Room
programme.desc: One of the costliest renovation challenges in any house is the kitchen. Sarah bucks this trend with stylish, customized ready-made cabinetry and useful solutions for absolutely everything...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Curb Appeal
programme.desc: Nothing makes a better calling card than curb appeal. It’s also one of the most expensive home renovation projects to undertake. Sarah modernizes the house’s exterior by replacing a tangle of trees...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Grand Finale
programme.desc: How far have Sarah’s imagination, limited budget and sheer determination taken her? On buying the house, Sarah’s real estate agent strongly advised she be penny-wise, and spend no more than $170,000 on the entire renovation...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Entry & Mudroom
programme.desc: Sarah buys a farm within commuting distance of a major city to get more space for the money and prove you can get the home of your dreams right now...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Main Bedrooms
programme.desc: Living outside of a major city can mean unexpected sleepovers. Sarah transforms the farmhouse’s two original bedrooms into distinctive and welcoming quarters that also work for impromptu guests...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Main Bath
programme.desc: It’s a lesson on maximizing style on a minimal budget. Sarah and Tommy modernize a tired bathroom with new fixed elements like flooring, fixtures and standalone shower...

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Tongue-tied
programme.desc: Tensions erupt between Jade and Sean at Kloie's birthday dinner. After their intense text fight, Briana tries to put aside her anger with Devoin for Nova's birthday. (S10, ep15)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Say OK
programme.desc: Jade's frustrations force her to break up with Sean. Kailyn tries to co-parent through the stress of virtual learning. Chelsea gets busier as COVID-19 numbers spike in South Dakota. (S10, ep16)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Just Don't Sink It
programme.desc: Leah steps in when tensions between the twins boil over. Kailyn is forced to navigate the fallout of strong statements she made about Javi. (S10, ep17)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Under The Big Top
programme.desc: Chelsea makes a difficult decision about her future. Leah withdraws Gracie from cheer in order to keep Ali safe. Jade deals with Sean's messes after he breaks her window. (S10, ep18)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Spring Has Sprung
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Ashley takes an anniversary trip with her boyfriend. Leah receives life altering news about her health. Kail says goodbye to her old house and bittersweet memories. (S10, ep22)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Just Say Yes
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Ashley gives Bar an answer. Luis asks to see Stella for the first time in months, forcing Bri to decide what is truly best for her daughter. (S10, ep23)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Level Up
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, after a Covid exposure at the girls' school, Leah has to make some difficult decisions. Devoin lets Nova down and Briana must pick up the pieces. (S10, ep24)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Not Quite
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut Sean proposes, but Jade's not sure how to respond. Leah is forced into quarantine when Jeremy tests positive for covid. Briana introduces her man to the cameras. (S10, ep25)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Full Circle
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Jade decides to get plastic surgery in Miami, so Briana visits to coach her through her anxiety. Bar goes to court for his outstanding DUI charges. (S10, ep26)

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Ashley
programme.desc: Ashley is a pregnant high school senior from Texas with no baby daddy weighing in, and a family encouraging her to choose adoption. But when the time comes, what will she decide?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Unseen Moments 2
programme.desc: Unseen moments from the episodes Brooke, Felicia, Emily, Markai, Aubrey, Christinna, Kayla, Megan, and Ashley.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Reunion
programme.desc: Dr. Drew hosts an emotional finale as the teen mothers from the latest series share a stage, coming together with their boyfriends & parents to talk about the issues they face.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jordan
programme.desc: Jordan and her sister were models and best friends until Jordan's pregnancy put all that on hold. Now her boyfriend and her sister are competing to be her number one.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jennifer
programme.desc: After abandoning sports and losing her friends, Jennifer has to battle with her over-protective parents to accept her boyfriend before she gives birth to twin boys.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jamie
programme.desc: Raised by a single mum, Jamie is a straight A student with big plans for the future. But after getting pregnant she struggles to mould her immature boyfriend into the father she never had.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Danielle
programme.desc: After following her mum's footsteps by becoming a teen mum, Danielle strives to prove she can do things differently. But she soon learns she needs help managing school, a job and a baby.
